Name: FalCom
Description:
FalCom is a pioneering Danish company committed to enhancing the effectiveness and safety of defense, security, and law enforcement professionals worldwide. We deliver advanced communication and hearing protection solutions designed for the demanding conditions of extreme environments and critical decision-making.

Our mission is simple yet profound: empowering those who protect us. Our modular systems are tailored to the diverse operational needs of our customers, providing seamless communication and robust hearing protection, from individual operators to multi-channel mission teams. Supported by strategic partnerships, rigorous third-party certifications, and a comprehensive global support network, FalCom ensures every product meets and exceeds the highest standards of quality and performance.

As an independent brand within the GN Group, we draw on more than 150 years of unparalleled audio expertise. By uniting innovation across medical, consumer, professional, and military audio sectors under one roof, this unique heritage enables FalCom to deliver trusted technology and scalable systems to elite units and government agencies across NATO and allied nations.

Name: STEST
Description:
Standart Kontrol ve Test Hizmetleri (STEST), Askeri ve Sivil Testler başta olmak üzere sektörün ihtiyaç duyduğu Türkiye’nin tam bağımsız, tarafsız test faaliyetlerinin yürütülmesi amacı ile 2017 yılında Ankara Malıköy Anadolu OSB’de kurulmuştur. Türkiye’nin hacim ve kapasite anlamında özel sermayeli en büyük test alt yapısına sahip test merkezi STEST, sektörün öncü gelen firmaları arasında çok kısa bir sürede yerini almış ve yerli yabancı birçok firmaya test hizmeti vermektedir.
2021 yılı içerisinde gerçekleşen TÜRKAK denetimi ile Türkiye’de konusunda uzman hizmet veren tek özel laboratuvar olmuştur. Her yıl gerçekleşen denetimler ile hizmet ağını genişleterek, bünyesine EMI EMC ve ATP Test laboratuvar hizmetlerini eklemiş ve bugün, kapsamında yer alan 100’ün üzerinde ulusal / uluslararası standart ile yerli ve yabancı bir çok kuruluşa; tip deneyleri, AR&GE hizmetleri, kabul deneyleri alanlarında çözüm ortaklığı sağlamaktadır.

Name: Mission Space | Space Weather
Description:
Mission Space is redefining how industries understand and respond to space weather.

We are building a dedicated orbital constellation equipped with proprietary sensors designed to measure radiation, plasma, and geomagnetic activity with high precision. Our multi-point, real-time data streams feed into an advanced forecasting model, delivering actionable insights with 200% greater accuracy compared to current industry standards.

Our proprietary sensors measure proton flux, electron flux, alpha particles, plasma densities, and magnetic field variations. The first generation of ZOHAR-I payloads is already operational, with spectrometers and Cherenkov detectors providing particle energy measurements across key energy ranges.

We are expanding rapidly, deploying additional payloads, including Surface Charge Monitors, X-ray and Gamma-ray Spectrometers, and Plasma Probes, to build the first mid-Earth orbit constellation focused solely on space weather.

Mission Space serves four key verticals:
	•	Satellite operators and space traffic management: improving orbital calculations and neutral density modeling
	•	Airlines: safeguarding polar flights from VHF disruptions and radiation risks
	•	Power grid operators: offering localized forecasting for critical infrastructure and regulatory compliance
	•	Frontier technologies: supporting lunar surface missions and next-generation supersonic aviation

Name: Centurum
Description: Our core capabilities - Cybersecurity, Systems Integration, Communications and Network Engineering, Software Engineering, Operational and Technical Support, and Information Operations - place us at the center of Federal Government efforts to build and deploy effective world-wide wired/wireless Network Centric C5ISR solutions and to provide intelligence analysis support to the Global War on Terror. In addition to our Headquarters Office in Marlton NJ, we have operational offices in the Washington, DC metropolitan area; Chesapeake, VA; Charleston, SC; and San Diego, CA.  Our locations place us only minutes away from most Federal Government Department and Agency Headquarters and the US Navy's Fleet concentration areas.

Name: Armor Express
Description: Armor Express is a leading manufacturer and distributor of high-performance body armor systems. Founded in 2005, the Company has grown to become one of the largest providers of soft and hard armor products and accessories, serving the domestic and Federal law enforcement market, U.S Military and America’s allies around the world. Through its strategic partnerships with technology innovators and its unwavering commitment to advance research & development, the Company’s customers benefit from state-of-the-art protective solutions and best-in-class service.

Name: Endeavor Robotics
Description:
Formerly Endeavor Robotics and now FLIR Unmanned Ground Systems, we are the world’s leading provider of battle-tested Unmanned Ground Vehicles (UGVs). We partner with U.S. and international military, law enforcement and industrial users to design and build technologically advanced robots that support a wide range of missions. Whether it’s a roadside bomb on the battlefield, a suspicious package on the subway, or a potential hazmat situation, our robots help keep troops, first responders, and the public safe. FLIR UGS has delivered more than 7,000 UGVs to customers in over 55 countries. 

Ranging in size from five to 500 pounds, our trusted robots have been used countless times in the field to provide a greater stand-off distance from danger. Using an array of sensors, they gather valuable intelligence so decision-makers can better understand the situation and respond to possible threats. Our family of UGVs are modular, adaptable, easy-to-use, and meet or exceed the needs of operators in any uniform.

Based in Chelmsford, Mass., FLIR Unmanned Ground Systems is a great place to work. All our products are proudly designed and built in the U.S.A., and veterans make up a sizable part of our workforce. Our processes have been certified as ISO 9001:2015.

Driven to Save Lives.

Description:
ThalesRaytheonSystems (TRS) is a defence company that specializes in air operation command and control systems.

Name: Kraus Hamdani Aerospace, Inc.
Description:
Based on a heritage of defense, security and technology innovation, Kraus Hamdani Aerospace Inc. is disrupting the UAS space by developing cost-effective fully electric zero-emissions AI powered unmanned aircraft that fly with infinite airborne endurance.

Our UAS are a world first for truly persistent aerial capabilities to revolutionize how we conduct non-stop airborne services. Description:
Founded in 2002 by former military and business leaders, VectorCSP planted its roots in northeastern North Carolina. Our first contract was with the U.S. Coast Guard, supporting the acquisition of C-130Js by developing the Integrated Logistics Support (ILS) solutions that continue to serve the fleet today. In short order we were supporting multiple aviation platforms and in 2008 expanded our logistics and engineering offerings to the federal and military maritime communities. In 2010 VectorCSP was awarded a contract through GSA to conduct aviation and maritime analysis across the government enterprise. We capitalized on our broad technical program experience and superior customer delivery track record by winning the GSA OASIS Small Business contract in 2014, and subsequently an OASIS task order supporting U.S. Air Force Special Operations Command aviation training program. The future for VectorCSP is bright, and the majority of our story has yet to be written.

We understand that to remain operationally viable, organizations must continually strike the balance between integrating new capabilities while supporting legacy capabilities – and always with a fixed eye on Cost, Schedule, and Performance (CSP). Our complementary mission support capability offerings provide our federal and military customers with the expertise, flexibility, and scalability that allow them to focus on our nation’s critical missions.

Name: PIAP Space
Description:
PIAP Space Sp. z o. o. (PIAP Space) is a Polish company established in 2017 as a spin-off of the Łukasiewicz Research Network - Industrial Institute for Automation and Measurements (Ł-PIAP). Currently, the owners of PIAP Space are: Industrial Development Agency (IDA) and Ł-PIAP. 
PIAP Space has a complete infrastructure to provide services guarantees their continuity and repeatability. The implemented ISO 9001:2015 certified for quality in design, development, manufacturing, assembly and tests, in scope of space technology and robotics as well as Project Management Office, Quality Management Department, Purchasing Department, IT Department and the well-established structure of other departments in the company also ensure data security mechanisms, openness to new data and their redundancy.
PIAP Space focuses on two specialisations: 
- SPACE ROBOTICS - PIAP Space develops technologies and products in the space robotics domain for In-Orbit Servicing and future ISAM missions. PIAP Space has developed robotic arm and grippers (LARIS gripper, Multipurpose gripper), 6-axis Force and Torque Sensor and vision-based algorithms for close range rendezvous and LAR pose estimation. 
- MECHANICAL GROUND SUPPORT EQUIPMENT (MGSE) - PIAP Space offers various types of devices for the assembly, integration, and testing of satellites and their subsystems. The company has experience in supplying integration adapters (GHA), and Vibration Tests Adapters (VTA). It also manufactures integration stands for a satellite and its panels (PIS, PIT). Besides, the company offers Clamp Bands, Lifting Devices, and Thermal - Vacuum compatible MGSE. 
PIAP Space has wide experience in European Commission framework programs H2020 and HEU collaborative projects. PIAP Space is also involved in transnational projects in the robotics area,  as well as other projects in the robotics technology area.

With more than 20 years of development in moving target indication, AI computer vision and machine learning, Sentient has deployed thousands of systems worldwide in the field of Intelligence, Surveillance, Search and Rescue, enhancing situational awareness, accelerating informed decisions and saved numerous lives.
For more information, visit www.sentientvision.com

The Group’s products are at the center of multiple military programs and applications. Its infrared (IR) detectors are the key component of many top brands in commercial thermal imaging equipment sold across Europe, Asia and North America. The organization is the leading European manufacturer for IR detectors deployed in space.

Name: Aerodyne Industries LLC
Description:
Aerodyne Industries LLC is a Service-Disabled, Veteran-Owned Small Business (SDVOSB) headquartered in Cape Canaveral, FL. CEO Andrew (Andy) Allen has 30 years of experience in the aerospace industry and is a former United States Marine Corps Lieutenant Colonel. A former Marine test pilot and NASA astronaut, he understands the critical role of information technology, design engineering, human factor engineering, sustaining engineering, maintenance, operations and safety compliance. Andy has also performed in senior leadership positions at the NASA Kennedy Space Center (KSC), NASA Johnson Space Center, NASA Headquarters, United Space Alliance (USA) and Honeywell.

Our success is driven by a combination of deep technical and managerial experience and an unwavering commitment to quality and integrity.

Our mission-driven approach has earned support from the firearm community, the tech world, and the media.

Biofire employees are world-class engineers who have designed and tested firearms, medical devices, robots, cars, satellites, rockets, and supersonic jets. What unites our team is our commitment to safety and reliability that we bring to our work every day.

Name: Chemring Energetic Devices
Description:
1.	History / Background

Chemring Energetic Devices (CED), located in Downers Grove, Illinois, has been manufacturing mission critical ordnance, pyro-mechanical components and electronics for the defense and aerospace industry since the 1950s.

2.	Business Segments

CED’s business is divided into four market segments: 
Aircraft Pyro Segment
This segment has historically been the mainstay of CED’s business. CED is the leading supplier of CAD/PAD devices (Cartridge Activated/Propellant Actuated) for the life-support and emergency egress needs of US military pilots. CED enjoys an excellent reputation for the quality of its products. CED’s top customers are USAF and US Navy on ejection seat legacy aircraft platforms. 

Missiles Segment
CED has long been a top pyro-mechanisms supplier to some of the major US Missile platforms. CED manufactures devices for JASSM, THAAD, and Tomahawk etc. These devices are primarily pyro-mechanical devices for the missile’s propulsion and flight maneuvering applications.

Space Segment
This segment is centered on CED’s sole-sourced position on Initiators. Our NASA heritage provides truly “space-grade” quality and reliability, not only to the initiators but to all pyro-mechanical devices that are driven by those initiators. CED’s customers are the launch vehicle and satellite primes and tier-1 systems providers.

Electronics Segment
With their JCAST and SCOT tester line of products, CED is the sole source provider of portable test equipment used by USAF pilots to check out their life support and communications gear prior to flight. 

3.	Core Technology Expertise
CED is recognized as the leading technical expert in energetics engineering. CED develops its ordnance and pyrotechnic devices by applying physics-based analysis and modelling. CED possesses unique and internally-developed computational models for designing and troubleshooting complex pyro-mechanical devices.

Name: CONTROL LOGISTICO CONSULTING GROUP
Description: CONTROL LOGISTICO is a niche-oriented defense consulting firm dedicated to providing smart and fast market entry intelligence to companies around the world who are interested in penetrating the Latin American military markets. Name: URSC - U R Rao Satellite Centre
Description:
U R Rao Satellite Centre is the lead centre of the Indian Space Research Organisation(ISRO) responsible for design, development, checkout & integration of communication, navigation, remote sensing, scientific and small satellite missions.

The specialised teams of scientists, engineers and technicians of URSC have built more than 90 complex & advanced satellites for various applications in areas of telecommunications, television broadcasting, VSAT services, telemedicine, tele-education, navigation, weather forecasting, disaster warning, search and rescue operations, earth observations, natural resource management, scientific and space science etc.

With the objective of taking the benefits of space technology to the length & breadth of the society, URSC is actively involved in creating cost-effective space infrastructure for India.

Vision: To harness space technology for national development, while pursuing space science research and planetary explorations.

Mission: Building satellites to provide satellite-based services to the common man and pursuing research and development in satellite-related technologies.

Functions of URSC:
The primary function of URSC is design, development, integration and testing of different categories of satellites like Communication, Earth observation, Navigation and Space Science Satellites.
The centre is responsible for the total Spacecraft project management from Conceptualisation phase to In-orbit spacecraft operationalisation phase
Pursue Research & developments in the area of advanced state-of-the-art satellite-related technologies and also establish the necessary infrastructure for satellite building activities.
Actively involve Private, Public sector Industries for realising satellite systems.
Promote and encourage student community by providing opportunities for Universities, Colleges and Academia in Research & Developmental activities including Small Satellites.

Name: ELT GROUP DEUTSCHLAND
Description:
ELT Group Deutschland is a medium-sized company, which offers solutions and services for European armed forces, institutions as well as international industrial customers for Public Security, System integration and Electronic Warfare.

ELT Group Deutschland is part of ELT Group, a 70 years world leader in Electronic Defense systems. Thanks to innovative management of the electromagnetic spectrum, achieved through proprietary and integrated technologies, today the brand is an International Group with a multi-domain approach that also covers Cyber, Space, and Biodefense.

Name: Colt Canada
Description:
Over the 40 years since this company's inception as Diemaco, Canada’s Centre of Excellence for Small Arms, Colt Canada has established itself as a world class manufacturer.  Our products have been battle tested and proven through jungle mud, arctic snow and ice, desert sands and extreme battlefield conditions. The reliability of these Canadian born rifles, carbines, machine-guns and grenade launchers are second to none.

At Colt Canada, we listen to our customers because they make up some of the most elite units and police services in the world. Our dedication to evaluating emerging technologies and incorporating real-world feedback ensures that our products continue to improve and advance the operational capabilities of the user.  Our military customers gather bi-annually to share information about the weapon systems. Here we are able to discuss new design ideas, developments and requirements face to face.

Colt Canada’s continued success in providing clients with leading edge products, services and systems is made possible through the outstanding skills and capabilities of the men and women who are Colt Canada. Our employees understand and accept the profound responsibility of delivering critically important products and services to military and law enforcement clients. They take pride in making that responsibility an integral part of everything they do.

Name: Steiner eOptics
Description:
Steiner eOptics, Inc. designs and manufactures cutting-edge technology products that provide Military, Homeland Security, Law Enforcement, and Commercial users with improved situational awareness in both day and night operations. The company’s products are grouped into four main areas: Imaging Systems, Laser Aiming Systems, Beacon Systems, and Illumination Systems.

Imaging Systems include low profile, digital, and fused night vision devices such as the AN/PVS-21 used worldwide by elite fighting units; Heads Up Displays and viewers (HUD / HMD); and Intelligence, Surveillance, and Reconnaissance (ISR) equipment. Laser Systems include a wide array of aiming solutions, such as the Dual Beam Aiming Laser (DBAL) series of products and the AN/PEQ-15A, as well as illuminators and pointers. Beacon Systems are focused on Combat Identification / Identification of Friend or Foe (CID/IFF) as well as Tagging, Tracking, and Locating (TTL) systems. The Battle Light product line is designed to guarantee high brightness Illumination Systems in any tactical situation. All our products are available in spectral bands that include UV, Visible, NIR, SWIR, MWIR, and LWIR.

Founded in 1979, Steiner eOptics Inc. was the first company to mount aiming lasers on small arms. This technology leadership continues today, reflecting the strong heritage and quality of Beretta Holding’s Steiner brand. The company is headquartered in Miami Township, Ohio where its products are produced, with a second location focused on research and development located in Waitsfield, Vermont. All eOptics products proudly carry the “Made in the USA” label.

Steiner eOptics’ superior technology, performance, and support enable our users to more quickly and accurately detect, identify, and target their objectives. The future of Optics is eOptics.

Name: IERUS Technologies Inc
Description: IERUS, at its core, is a high-end technology firm. IERUS recruits and retains a work force of highly skilled and educated engineers, scientists, and mathematicians. While IERUS’s core is electro-optics/infra-red (EOIR) and electromagnetic (EM) technology, IERUS engineers come from various backgrounds. IERUS employees are our most valuable asset, and we are committed to recruiting high caliber personnel. IERUS emphasizes creativity and fosters an environment that encourages employees to pursue technically challenging problems that fit within their interest and capability set. IERUS’s work force education ranges from bachelors through PhDs, specializing in Electrical Engineering, Mechanical Engineering, Physics, and Math. Approximately one quarter of IERUS’s technical staff have PhDs, over three quarters hold a Masters level degree or above, and the remaining have bachelors engineering degrees. The current membership includes geologists and remote sensing experts employed within industry, academia and government agencies, as well as graduate students. Although the parent bodies are both based in the UK the GRSG is an international organisation with members around the globe. 

The activities of the GRSG include:

-Holding an annual meeting devoted to geological remote sensing
-Producing well-stocked and informative quarterly newsletter
-Disseminating news and events relevant to GRSG members
-Providing funds for research projects through the GRSG student awards
-Organising occasional field trips and other one-off events

Name: Project Sunride
Description:
Formed in 2017, Project Sunride is a student-led rocketry team at the University of Sheffield. Project Sunride currently holds the UK Open Alititude record at 36,274ft, which the team achieved in 2019 with their rocket "Helen".

Sunride developed a 3D-printed, bipropellant rocket engine, Sunfire II, which was hotfired in July 2023, achieving 3.4kN for 5 seconds.

Sunride's Rockets:
Amy (2018) and Helen (2019) were launched at Spaceport America Cup in New Mexico, USA.
Karman Alpha (July 2023) was launched at Friends of Amateur Rocketry in the Mojave Desert, California, USA.
Karman Mini (November 2022/March 2023) and Test Rocket 2 (April/May/June 2023) were launched at Midland Rocketry Club in Leicestershire, UK.

For more info on Project Sunride visit https://sunride.space/

To contact Sunride, please email sunride@sheffield.ac.uk

Name: ASGSR American Society for Gravitational and Space Research
Description: Since 1984, the American Society for Gravitational and Space Research (ASGSR), a non-profit 501(c)6, provides a forum for high quality discovery-based, exploration-enabling, space biological and physical science research, technology, and training the next generation of scientists. ASGSR brings together a diverse group of scientists and engineers to encourage an exchange of ideas bridging basic and applied biological research in space and gravitational sciences through it annual meetings. The members represent academia, government, and industry interests bonded by a common issue -  how living organisms and physcial systems respondto gravity (e.g. low-gravity, hyper-gravity, etc.). The vision of ASGSR is to advance biological and physical science research in, of and for space by bringing together professional communities spanning gravitational biology, radiation biology, physical sciences, bioastronautics and astrobiology, and mentoring the future scientific and engineering leaders in these fields. Name: European Unmanned Ground Systems
Description:
The mutual goal for the European nations joined in the PESCO project „integrated Unmanned Ground Systems“ (iUGS)  and the EDIDP project „integrated Modular Unmanned Ground Systems“ (iMUGS) is to develop a modular and scalable architecture of unmanned ground systems.

This site will cover the results and developments of both mentioned projects and any other relevant projects conducted under the same concept in the future. 

The PESCO iUGS project is coordinated by Estonia and involves Belgium, Czech Republic, Germany, Finland, France, Greece, Hungary, Italy, Latvia, Netherlands, Poland and Spain. Project aims at the development of a modular UGS architecture capable of carrying different payloads and sensors. 

Given its potential, the project received funds under the EDIDP umbrella with a financial contribution of 30.6 million euro – the iMUGS project. iMUGS is in the overall following the same goal, but the detailed objectives and technical solutions for the European standardized unmanned ground system were agreed by seven of the previously mentioned nations: Belgium, Spain, Latvia, France, Germany, Finland and Estonia as the coordinator. The project is structured along 7 sub-projects that all cover studies, design, prototyping, testing and technical coordination:

1. System Integration
2. Autonomous Functions
3. Cyber Security
4. Communication 
5. Swarming
6. Command, Control and Interoperability
7. Manned-Unmanned Teaming

The industry consortium, led by Milrem Robotics, comprises some of the best in class European players in their respective fields: SAFRAN Electronics & Defense SAS, GT Cyber Technologies OÜ, Bittium Wireless Oy, Insta DefSec Oy, GMV Aerospace and Defence SAU, Krauss-Maffei Wegmann GmbH & Co KG, Diehl Defence GmbH & Co KG, Nexter Systems SA, Latvijas Mobilais Telefons SIA, (Un)Manned NV, Ecole Royale Militaire – Koninkljike Militaire School and dotOcean NV.

Camero's  Xaver family of products includes the 3D Xaver 1000 based on AI algorithm, the hand-held tactical Xaver 400 and Xaver 100, and the Xaver Long Range 40/80, all providing through-the-wall visual indication employing top-notch radar technology. The Xaver systems are operated daily by elite military, law enforcement, special forces, and Search & Rescue teams around the world.

'Through-Wall Vision' and STTW are employed to change the dynamics of your urban operation. With the Xaver systems' patented technology, the operators can rapidly and reliably detect one or more people behind the wall and continuously monitor their number, distance from the wall, and their pattern of movement in real-time, while positioned safely outside the room's walls. +

Camero-Tech’s systems were successfully operated in the September 2017 earthquake in Mexico and the February 2023 earthquake in Turkey. In both disastrous events, our Xaver  systems managed to locate the trapped survivors and guide the rescuers to their exact location.

Camero-Tech is run by an experienced management team with decades of experience providing solutions to major government and commercial customers.

SK GROUP
Camero is a part of the SK GROUP, a leading global defense and security group that includes Israel Weapons Industries (IWI), Meprolight, Israel Shipyards, PI Systems, Uniscope, and more.

Name: Microflown AVISA
Description:
Microflown AVISA (www.microflown-avisa.com) develops and markets capabilities for the defense & security markets that do provide full and comprehensive 3D acoustic situational awareness.
The enabler is the Microflown transducer, the worlds first and only sensor that measures acoustic particle velocity instead of sound pressure.

The main sensor node platform is the Acoustic Multi Mission Sensor (AMMS). Its favorable SWaP features allow use:
•	as unattended ground sensor
•	on ground vehicles
•	on multi copters

Capabilities are based on either networked or standalone versions of the AMMS, capable of:
•	detecting
•	localizing 
•	tracking and 
•	classifying

all sorts of audible events/platforms, such as:
•	Small Arms Fire (SAF)
•	Rockets, artillery, mortars (RAM)
•	Helicopters and heavy ground vehicles
•	drones

Networked capabilities offered include firmware/software for:

•	compound protection, localizing firing positions of incoming mortars and small arms fire
•	alerting and cueing radars towards hostile firing positions
•	sound ranging, localizing hostile artillery and rocket launchers firing positions
•	target practicing 

Stand alone capabilities include foremost:
•	gunshot localization

The aforementioned capabilities can be enhanced by another sensor node platform, the so called Acoustic Pointer, into the network.
The 3D acoustic vector sensor node can be installed on a fixed wing drone taking headwind.

Name: MINISTERE DE LA DEFENSE DE COTE D'IVOIRE
Description:
Les notions de sécurité et de conflits évoluent en permanence. Pour le Ministère de la Défense de Côte d’Ivoire, ce constat impose une réorganisation stratégique globale dans l’utilisation des moyens de défense au sein et à l’extérieur du pays. 
Avec le Conseil National de Sécurité (CNS) et la Réforme du Secteur de la Sécurité (RSS),  la Stratégie de Sécurité Nationale se met en œuvre progressivement sur la période 2014/2024. 

Les fonctions stratégiques retenues au niveau national sont : connaître et anticiper, prévenir, protéger et intervenir. 

Le Ministère de la Défense est responsable, sous l’autorité du Président de la République, de l’exécution de la politique de Défense. Il a en particulier en charge l’organisation, la gestion, la mise en condition d’emploi et la mobilisation de l’ensemble des Forces Armées ainsi que de l’infrastructure militaire qui leur est nécessaire. Il a autorité sur l’ensemble des Forces Armées et est responsable de leur sécurité.

Le rôle du ministère de la Défense est d’assurer la protection du territoire, de la population et des intérêts Ivoirien, contribuer à la paix et à la sécurité sur le continent africain et dans le monde, notamment par la participation aux opérations de maintien de la paix (OMP).

Au-delà de ces missions, le ministère de la Défense s’implique également dans des missions de service public. Ses moyens humains et matériels soutiennent les actions d’autres ministères.

Pour l’exercice de ses attributions, le Ministre de la Défense, dispose d’une administration centrale et de deux organes de commandement constitués de l’Etat-Major Général des Armées et du Commandement Supérieur de la Gendarmerie Nationale.

From our 19" rackmount cases and deep drawn aluminum enclosures, to our water-tight ruggedized plastic cases and strong, yet lightweight aluminum carrying cases, we specialize in meeting and exceeding the complex needs of the most demanding industries. For Unparalleled Protection, choose ZERO. Visit www.zeroses.com for more information.

Name: ÇINA OTOMOTİV MAKİNA
Description:

Uçak motor ve diğer parçaları,

Havacılık işleme, montaj ve test fikstürleri,
Özel Makinalar ile özellikle Milli Havacılık ve Savunma Sanayinin bir üyesi olmanın haklı gururunu taşımaktadır.

Description: Protecting our protectors through the relentless pursuit of technology and innovation.

Name: Africa Aerospace and Defence
Description:
The Africa Aerospace and Defence (AAD) Exhibition is one of the world's premier aerospace and defence events, holding a prominent position within the aviation and defence calendar. The exhibition takes place on a biennial basis in September. The first three days of the exhibition are traditionally trade days, followed by two days where the air show is open to the public.

AAD has grown in leaps and bounds and serves the interests of both the civilian and military sectors. It has established itself as a major platform for South Africa's defence, commercial and general aviation, space, homelands security, humanitarian relief disaster management, freight and forwarding services as well as search and rescue technologies. It is the largest defence show of air, land and sea on the African continent – attracting the most advanced technologies from far and wide.

AAD is a very successful partnership between South Africa's Aerospace, Maritime and Defence Industry Association (AMD), ARMSCOR and the Commercial Aviation Association of Southern Africa (CAASA). Added to this, AAD has full support from the Department of Defence as well as active support from the Department of Trade & Industry and the Department of Transport and Science & Technology.

The AAD Expo will take place at AFB Waterkloof, Centurion, City of Tshwane, South Africa from 16 - 20 September 2026, and will once again bring together worldwide industry players to showcase the latest technological innovations.

Name: Bowler Pons Solutions Consultants, LLC
Description: Bowler Pons Solutions Consultants, LLC (BPSC) is an SBA 8(a)-certified Minority and Service-Disabled Veteran-Owned Small Business (SDVOSB) technology consultancy and solution developer comprised of seasoned thought leaders poised to help clients with their toughest challenges. With expertise spanning Engineering, Research & Development, Information Technology, Cybersecurity, Data Analytics, and Technical Program & Project Management, we offer core services focused on delivering client-specific solutions that are aimed at fostering progress in the modern world of technological challenges. Please visit our site to learn more about Bowler Pons and how we can work together on influencing progress!

Name: Solidus Technical Solutions, LLC
Description:
Solidus Technical Solutions is a software services and multi-disciplined engineering development firm. Established in 2001, we are a Small, Woman and Veteran owned business.

We prioritize helping you build exceptional skills in your career. With a wide range of diverse project opportunities, long-term employment stability, and an inclusive, supportive work environment, we empower you to thrive and reach your full potential.

Our Mission: Uniting talented people, advanced technology, and superior service

Our Vision: Empower & support our employees to thrive and achieve excellence in the pursuit of advancing technology.

Name: Alaris Linwave
Description:
Radio Frequency requirements are changing rapidly as new, mission-critical technologies are introduced. Our clients need novel solutions for the increasingly challenging environments in which they work.
 
At Alaris Linwave, we have a long history of supplying custom Microwave-integrated modules that are especially suited to harsh environments.
 
Our specialist teams of highly skilled engineers have decades of experience in RF, stemming from the early days of Microwave in the UK in the 1980s. They have extensive experience across a wide range of markets, from Defence and Avionics to Medical, Telecoms and Space.
 
In fact, at Linwave, when we talk about our highs and lows, we’re generally referring to the products our clients use from the depths of Naval submarines to high-altitude avionics.
 
But despite their impressive knowledge and experience, our engineers know there is always more to learn. Ongoing training and development ensure our teams are always up to date with the latest processes, techniques and materials, and how we can leverage them to bring custom solutions for high-spec applications to life - on time and within the agreed budget.
 
We also frequently partner with external systems designers, and it’s exciting to see how they combine our engineering enterprise solutions with their own core areas of system expertise to create customised and unique solutions for highly specialised applications.
 
All of which means that when you trust us with your RF solutions, you’ll benefit from more than a high-spec product offering superior electrical, mechanical and environmental performance. You’ll also be able to:
 
- Reduce your footprint – we work from bare die up to minimise size.
- Enhance your system performance – we integrate functionality to make our products lighter, smaller and more powerful.
- Integrate software and hardware functions to maximise overall efficiency.
- Define and capture detailed requirements for best system improvements.

Name: 3DEO, Inc.
Description: We are a hardware spin-out from MIT Lincoln Lab, commercializing advanced lidar systems for airborne 3D mapping. 3DEO designs, builds, qualifies, operates, and maintains lidar systems for government and commercial applications. Our engineers have designed and built the world’s most capable lidar sensors, integrated them into airplanes, flown with them, and gotten them to work reliably for operational use by the US Department of Defense. We love this stuff! Our engineers like that we are a “you build it, you fly it” company.

Name: Orbital Research Ltd.
Description:
Orbital Research builds frequency converters for the most challenging SATCOM conditions on the planet – sandstorms, snowstorms and everything in between. Our low noise block downconverters (LNBs), block downconverters (BDCs), low noise amplifiers (LNAs), multiplexers and other products form critical components of advanced earth stations and SATCOM-on-the-Move (SOTM) terminals. 

We offer standard professional products as well as customized solutions that meet demanding specs and timelines. All of our frequency conversion products are ultra-high performance and quality. They are small and lightweight, and use the latest technologies to deliver excellent data throughput and reliability – even in extreme temperatures and humidity, and on fast-moving vehicles, planes and ships. 

Based in Burnaby, Canada, Orbital Research is a private company serving military, aeronautical, Earth observation and other satellite industries.

Name: IRISPACE
Description:
IRISPACE est une initiative régionale qui vise à accompagner le développement des technologies spatiales et de leurs applications dans le cadre de la Recherche, la Formation, l'Innovation et les Usages.

Institut unique en France, IRISPACE est composé d'Institutionnels et d'Entreprises de premier plan sur l'ensemble de la chaine de valeur du domaine spatial: lanceurs, segment spatial, segment sol, traitement du signal, traitement des données, développement de services et d'applications.

IRISPACE accompagne la Région Bretagne dans sa Stratégie Régionale de Recherche et d'Innovation dans le domaine spatial. L'Institut tient également le rôle de relais de sa communauté auprès du CNES, et vice versa.

Name: Miltec
Description:
Founded in April 1997, Miltec Corporation is a leading technology provider with design, development, integration and test capabilities in the areas of missiles, space, sensors, and simulation. 

Miltec has headquarters located in Huntsville, Alabama and is organized into three strategic divisions: Miltec Missiles and Space, Miltec Systems, and Miltec Research and Technology. Collectively, these divisions provide extensive in-house engineering capabilities in all applicable areas related to defense/aerospace systems. These areas include, but are not limited to systems, aerodynamics, propulsion, guidance-navigation-and control (GNC), lethality/ warheads, simulation, avionics, structures, software, IMUs, seeker/sensors, and signal processing. The majority of the engineering staff is senior, with over 10 years experience, enabling Miltec to respond to highly technical problems efficiently and with precision.

Major customers for Miltec include the US Army’s Space and Missile Defense Command (USASMDC/ARSTRAT), Aviation and Missile Command (AMCOM) and Aviation and Missile Research Development and Engineering Center (AMRDEC), the Missile Defense Agency (MDA), the Missile and Space Intelligence Center (MSIC), NASA’s Marshall Space Flight Center (MSFC) and Kennedy Space Center (KSC), the Air Force Research Laboratory (AFRL), and the US Navy.  Miltec continues to diversify its customer base by offering commercial software applications to the commercial market and extending its reach to the international market.

Name: Nemrod-Enjeux Contemporains de Défense et de Sécurité
Description:
Nemrod – Enjeux Contemporains de Défense et de Sécurité est une association interuniversitaire qui rassemble des jeunes professionnels et des jeunes chercheurs spécialisés sur les questions de défense et de sécurité internationale.

Nos travaux sont publiés sur notre site internet. 

Nos équipes pluridisciplinaires regroupent des linguistes, des ingénieurs, des historiens, des philosophes ou des juristes, mus, dans leurs publications, par la volonté de créer des liens entre la société civile et le domaine militaire.

Name: Robertson Fuel Systems a HEICO Company
Description:
Since 1976, Robertson Fuel Systems has been in the business of saving the lives of our military personnel.  Founder, Dr. S. Harry Robertson, pioneered the development of crashworthy fuel systems for military aircraft and ground vehicles.  Dramatic improvements in post-incident fire suppression from the Vietnam era to today are due in large part to fuel containment. Robertson continues to enhance their products with company-funded research and development, and offers careers in aerospace, engineering and manufacturing while encouraging creativity and innovation.

Robertson Fuel Systems is a HEICO company (NYSE: HEI and HEI.A). HEICO has been ranked as one of the 100 World's Most Innovative Growth Companies, 100 Best Small Companies, and 200 Hot Shot Stocks by Forbes over the past decade.

Name: Huntsville SOF Network
Description: We are your advocate for building partnership capacity between Huntsville's infrastructure of the next generation innovators and their technologies with Special Operations Forces operating at the technical & tactical edge. The Huntsville SOF Network promotes the common interests advancing R&D across Huntsville's unique academic research programs, government, and industrial complex; providing innovation forums, requirements solutions; while stimulating collaboration, unique resourcing means, and cutting edge technology solutions that empowers our Nation's Special Operations Forces in DoD and Interagency.

Name: ModCo Engenharia
Description:
A ModCo Engenharia é uma empresa especializada no desenvolvimento de sistemas embarcados de alta confiabilidade, com foco em aplicações nas áreas de Espaço e Defesa.

Possuimos competência transversal demonstrada durante uma década de desenvolvimento de projetos bem sucedidos, resultantes da execução de mais de 150.000 horas-homem de Engenharia de Sistemas.

Description: Arcarithm is a proven leader in Artificial Intelligence-based solutions for commercial and defense markets. Our proprietary machine learning, natural language processing, deep learning and expert systems solutions range from individual products to turnkey platforms. We serve end-use customers and development partners with a broad range of Artificial Intelligence services and capabilities.

Name: Precision Technic Defence Group
Description:
Precision Technic Defence Group is a global leader in advanced defence solutions aimed at ensuring safe and stable societies and safeguarding people and communities from military threats, natural disasters, accidents, or acts of terrorism.

We offer a unique range of solutions from partners worldwide and we have extensive experience in matching technologies and interoperability requirements for a full range of integrated solutions.

With a deep understanding of the complex challenges that the end users face and the operational gaps that exist, we provide credible and high-quality solutions that bridge the gap between operational needs and industry capabilities. This approach is what we refer to as our all-in-one solution which includes:

•	Stakeholder Bridging
•	Solution Development
•	Procurement
•	Supply Chain Management
•	Service & Support

Product areas:
•	Soldier Systems
•	C4ISR Systems
•	Platform & Sensor Systems
•	Unmanned Systems
•	Service & Support
•	Training Services

Since the founding of our company in Denmark in 1985, we have evolved into a global corporation. With nearly 40 years of experience, we bring a wealth of knowledge to the table and are experts in delivering turnkey solutions. Our four decades in the industry also underlines our enduring presence as a reliable partner, providing the stability and longevity required for long-term partnerships and contracts.
Over the years, our expansion has been marked by strategic positioning in key countries, including Denmark, Sweden, Germany, Poland, France, the United Kingdom, Australia & the USA.

We are a trusted, long-term supplier and partner of choice for nations, governments, armed forces, national security agencies, and law enforcement around the globe.

We believe that freedom and safety form the foundation for a sustainable world – and vice versa – and sustainability is therefore an integral part of our strategy.

Name: GeoNorth Information Systems
Description:
GeoNorth Information Systems (GNIS) is an Information Technology solutions provider specializing in geospatial information, Geographic Information Systems (GIS), and custom application development.  Our clients include Federal, State and Local governments as well as enterprise commercial clients in the energy, natural resources, engineering and similar fields.  Established in 1994, we are an Alaskan Native Corporation (ANC) and Small Business Administration certified 8(a) firm. GNIS is headquartered in Anchorage, Alaska, with offices in Washington, D.C. and Colorado. GNIS is a subsidiary of The Tatitlek Corporation.

In the past several years, GNIS has been investing resources to establish a unique, robust and scalable infrastructure to support a wide-variety of geospatial requirements. Central to this effort is the establishment of a Multi-Mission Direct Receiving Station (DRS) in order to establish a unique commercial GEOINT capability for commercial imagery services on US soil.  This Multi-Mission DRS (located in Fairbanks, Alaska) is the only commercial entity on US soil capable of providing the full suite of commercial imaging services (tasking, collection, processing and delivery) for the entire Airbus Defense and Space (Airbus DS) constellation, including both EO and SAR sensors. The DRS is solely owned and operated by GNIS. In addition to our strategic partnership with Airbus DS, GNIS has established relationships with several other sources for geospatial data and services with the objective of offering a full suite of data sources and capabilities that can be tailored to meet whatever requirements our clients bring to us.

The GNIS team consists of several industry-veterans with years of experience and expertise in bringing together a variety of solution components, including data, software and other critical components that the most demanding of users require to meet their mission critical needs. Please go to our Team Page to learn more about our team.

Name: Veterans Psychology
Description:
The mission of Veterans Psychology is to provide exceptional, evidence based psychology services to individuals, organisations and government.  
 
Veterans Psychology connects the veteran community with mental health professionals who are veteran-focused and veteran-informed.  Most of our psychologists are veterans themselves, so have first-hand understanding of the military experience.

Name: Agile5 Technologies, Inc.
Description:
Agile5 Technologies is a small, woman-owned systems architecture and software development firm that specializes in enterprise software systems for government agencies, as well as commercial interests.

What Makes Us Different?

We are a young company with a talented group of engineers who proactively plan and implement robust enterprise systems capable of supporting the current and future needs of large government systems.
We are currently looking for opportunities to leverage our strengths to benefit partners interested in teaming with a company that is forward thinking and always precise in our execution of projects.

Cubecom designs, develops and manufactures communication systems for satellites.

Name: Radnor Range Ltd
Description:
Radnor is a privately owned UK-based organisation whose capability is centred on a multi-disciplinary range complex providing testing, evaluation and training services. Core competencies are centred on weapons, ordnance, munitions and explosives and their effects. In addition, we offer a safe and controlled testing environment for flying UAVs and drones as well as a confined site for the testing of RF and laser emitters.

The External Range allows blast trials up to 75kg HE (approx 100kg TNT) and firing trials up to 3000m depending on calibre and ammunition nature.  The indoor range, "Radnor Ballistics", offers environmental conditioning of targets and shooting up to 20mm rounds including FSPs.  At Radnor we test armour and vehicles to STANAG4569/VSAG/VPAM; composition testing to EMTAP/AOP7/STANAG 4170; and, insensitive munition (IM) testing to AOP39/DEFSTAN 0035.  Please contact us for more details or more trial and testing competencies.

As part of its on-going evolution, the site is now accredited to ISO 17025 for blast and ballistic testing,ISO 9001-2008 and ISO 14001 and, is a MOD (UK) supplier and an approved DSTL and MoD training range.

Radnor’s origins date back to the 1920’s when it was part of the then defence arm of Imperial Chemical Industries PLC (ICI). It subsequently became part of ICI’s subsidiary Imperial Metal Industries PLC (IMI) and was latterly utilised during the development of the majority of rocket motors produced by the UK defence sector during the last 40 years, along with a number of other weapons systems. In 1989 and in compliance with newly introduced regulations Radnor was licenced by the Health and Safety Executive as an explosive factory company for the manufacture and storage of explosives. 

Location

The range is discreetly located on the Welsh border in a steep sided valley and is directly accessible from the A44. Radnor is two hours’ drive from Birmingham International Airport and two hours from Bristol.

Name: American Defense International
Description:
American Defense International, Inc. (ADI) serves a worldwide client base with a unique combination of technical expertise and the ability to work with Washington's most important decision makers and opinion leaders.

ADI represents more than 100 organizations in 11 different countries. Our personnel come from diverse government backgrounds including former senior government officials, military officers, and congressional aides. Whether it's crafting a government affairs strategy, getting a message out to key decision makers and opinion leaders, or marketing a product or service to the federal government, ADI offers the knowledge, expertise, and quality service that will not be found anywhere else.

Description: PRECISION BARRELS, LLC is a Defense and Space company based in Cocoa, Florida, United States.

Name: Outpost Technologies
Description: Outpost Technologies was founded in 2017 to improve weapons systems analysis and testing capabilities. With our background in advanced materials design and fabrication, we not only assess systems already in place but we custom design, fabricate and assemble testing solutions for customers such as MDA and NASA. Our mission is to provide top-tier engineering solutions to help our customers solve their complex problems and push the boundaries of technology.

Name: Saab Bofors Dynamics Switzerland Ltd.
Description: Saab Bofors Dynamics Switzerland Ltd. is a company based in Thun, Canton of Bern, Switzerland.

Name: JRAD
Description:
As a recognized leader in the Chemical and Biological Defense (CBD) community, we will continually strive to provide a distinguishably high level of innovative, proactive approaches in science and technology (S&T), test and evaluation (T&E) and engineering efforts to the U.S. Government, industry and academia. Through the application of subject matter expertise, JRAD personnel will separate themselves from other engineers and scientists by providing consistently high quality services and products at the best value to our customer.

JRAD performs its mission through a framework of expertise, community structure, unbiased perspective and visionary leadership enhancing current and future readiness of the war fighter, first responder and civilian communities. JRAD personnel help transform defense objectives into defense achievements by supporting key decision-makers with sound judgment, reliable data and exceptional technical support.

Name: RPDE
Description:
The RPDE Program was created in 2005 as a collaborative arrangement between Defence, Industry and Academia, to solve difficult and challenging problems, in an innovative and collegiate environment.

All efforts were focussed on developing solutions quickly, to accelerate the delivery of Australian Defence Force capability.

Participants in the RPDE Program worked in a collaborative, non-competitive environment where commercial interests were set aside and background IP protected to find the best, workable solutions for Defence.

In 2018, RPDE was dissolved and its functions integrated into the Defence Innovation Hub.

Name: Prodesa Savunma ve Havacılık
Description:
Prodesa Defence & Aviation was established in 2016 in Ankara, provides electronic , electro-mechanic solutions to Defence & Aviation Sector.

CABLING DESIGN AND PRODUCTION
Designing cabling for various platforms according to the customer needs suitable both for military and commercial standarts. 
RF cabling, data cables, AC/DC power cables can be designed, produced, tested and documented.


ELECTRONICAL DESIGN:
Microwave circuits (couplers, power dividers and combiners, filters, true time delay circuits etc), Motherboard designs
RF strip analysis and designing RF PCB boards


ELECTROMECHANICAL DESIGN AND PACKAGING 
Compact electromechanical design and packaging. 
Laying the cabling, integrating electronical cards in the mechanical case is designed and documented. 
Prototype or serial production is avaliable in our laboratory.

TESTING AND VERIFICATION
RF circuitry, cabling, LRU or RF systems are tested in our laboratory with adequate test equipments. 
Testing software is also designed by our engineers. Verification and test results are custom reported according to the customer format.

Name: L-3 Coleman Aerospace
Description:
Coleman Aerospace is an innovative systems engineering and integration provider. Both a prime contractor and subcontractor, Coleman designs and produces sophisticated full-scale ballistic missiles as replicas of global missile defense threats.  Coleman provides a variety of suborbital launch vehicles, payloads, and launch services. Since the award of the Theater Missile Defense (TMD) Targets contract in 1992, Coleman has conducted over 25 target missile missions.

Several of Coleman's ground launch missions demonstrated new capabilities and/or launch sites. These include atmospheric reentry targets and radar experiments. Our success has fostered company growth and expansion into air-launched targets.

Coleman's air-launch capability allows the launch of missiles or rockets from cargo aircraft, anywhere in the world, at any azimuth/orbit inclination.

Coleman Aerospace is a wholly owned subsidiary of Aerojet Rocketdyne.

Name: Trident Research LLC
Description:
Founded in 2001 and headquartered in Austin, Texas,  Trident Research is a solutions-based engineering firm that applies disciplined systems engineering to design, develop, field, and sustain unique instrumentation systems and technologies.

Trident’s mission is to produce the best solutions possible, while making our instrumentation and technologies cost effective so they can be enjoyed by as many people as possible.  We are not driven by the bottom line and we do not answer to share holders or a board of directors.  We are motivated by our passion to make a difference in the world. We constantly challenge ourselves to bring a greater meaning to our work, pride to our team and an impact for those we serve.

Our core values are the key to the success of our dedicated team and growing company.

We are compassionate, critical thinkers, accountable for our work, transparent and engaging.

We are Trident.

Name: SpaceLab UFSC - Space Technology Research Laboratory
Description: As part of the Federal University of Santa Catarina's initiative to become a reference in aerospace science and technology, SpaceLab develops mission critical electronics and integration for nanosatellites, designs control software and hardware for microgravity experiments, cooperates with academia and industry in accomplishing space based solutions and much more. The group has flight experience with the FloripaSat-I mission and is rapidly growing into a national reference in this technology.

Name: Kestrel Enterprises, Inc.
Description:
Boeing is the world's largest aerospace company and leading manufacturer of commercial jetliners and defense, space and security systems. A top U.S. exporter, the company supports airlines and U.S. and allied government customers in more than 90 countries. Boeing products and tailored services include commercial and military aircraft, satellites, weapons, electronic and defense systems, launch systems, advanced information and communication systems, and performance-based logistics and training.

Boeing has a long tradition of aerospace leadership and innovation. The company continues to expand its product line and services to meet emerging customer needs. Its broad range of capabilities includes creating new, more efficient members of its commercial airplane family; integrating military platforms, defense systems and the warfighter through network-enabled solutions; creating advanced technology solutions; and arranging innovative customer-financing options. 

Boeing Defense, Space & Security (BDS) provides end-to-end services for large-scale systems that enhance air-, land-, sea- and space-based platforms for global military, government and commercial customers.

Name: Unified Electro-Tech Pvt Ltd
Description:
Unified is one of the largest electronic parts distributors in India, established in the year 2000 by a group of technocrats which is based in the software and technology hub of India, Bangalore, with Four offices across India (Mumbai, Delhi, Hyderabad, and Ahmedabad). Unified’s extensive product offering includes RF & Microwave products, Semiconductors, and other active and passive electronic components like phase-locked loops, modulators, oscillators, integrated circuits, IF amplifiers, switches, mixers, transistors, buffer amplifier, driver amplifiers, and LNA- to name a few. We offer Passive devices including capacitors, heat sinks, cables, connectors, resistors, baluns, and antennas.

Unified Electro-Tech operates on a uniquely designed business model that delivers high-quality products to our customers. We specialize in the rapid delivery of electronic components for design engineers and other buyers in the industry. We have a very strong presence in the  Railway, Medical, Automotive, Aerospace (our supplied components are used in the satellite orbiting the Earth), and Defense and telecom industries over the past years.

We at Unified understand the value of our customers - we deliver exceptional customer service at any time of the day regarding any query or problem our customers experience. We also provide our valuable customers with the best quality product with help of our highly experienced and qualified technical consultants.

Unified Electro-Tech is also majorly involved in the defense and aerospace industry segments. We have parts and solutions for all your problems, and we are committed to excellence.

Our team brings deep technical expertise and a strong customer focus, delivering solutions that reduce risk, improve readiness, and support mission outcomes.

Description: For nearly 20 years, Systems, Products, and Solutions (SPS), Inc. and its award-winning subsidiary aviation company, Millennium Systems Services, Inc. are established Federal Defense, Aviation, and Space Service providers. Our traditional business model is based on providing expert program management, as well as ground and aviation-based logistics, engineering, maintenance, weapon system fielding, training and technical publication services for Department of Defense and NASA Customers. D)(Aerospace) Quality Management System certifications; FedRamp compliant NIST 800-171 Controlled Unclassified Information (CUI) and NIST 800-53 Network Security compliant procedures; International Traffic in Arms (ITAR) compliance and a DCAA-approved accounting system. Description:
RMA Armament's mission is to protect your greatest assets. Whether it's your own health and well-being, your family, company or country, we believe in helping you protect what matters the most to you.

Founded in 2013, RMA Armament, Inc. is a Centerville, Iowa based corporation which conceptualizes, designs and manufactures composites solutions for the defense industry, as well as other markets.

All of RMA products are produced and manufactured in the USA and sold both domestically and internationally.

Best of all, RMA is a company owned by veterans and former police officers who know the special needs of those in harms way. Our superior products are also manufactured to the highest standard for those who need them, backed by these certifications:

Name: ISC Consulting Group
Description:

Our mission is to enable superior decision making through information dominance. ISC provides advanced education, analytic and technical solutions within strategic DOD and commercial markets. We leverage the best minds and technologies to make a measurable difference.  

ISC provides a multitude of specialized consulting services to our clients that make a measurable difference in the efficiency and effectiveness of our customer's mission and critical business processes. On any given day, you will hear our clients say, “ISC always places the mission first”.

We offer a broad spectrum of competencies and enabling services. Our core competencies are designed to make a measurable difference in every relationship we have with our clients and service delivery partners. Our clients recognize ISC’s ability to develop winning strategies, manage mission-critical programs, translate mission expectations and requirements into deliverables and key milestones, and advance the overall mission in a repeatable and predictable manner. Our delivery partners recognize ISC’s subject matter expertise in government contract management, our ability to develop solutions to complex requirements, and systematically improve the process necessary to truly make a measureable difference.

When you couple ISC’s core competencies of Project Management, Contract Management, and Relationship Management with a broad range of enabling services, you will find the ideal company to establish a contract relationship in support of your mission-critical program.

Name: GET Engineering
Description:
GET Engineering was founded in 1982 as a leading edge, high technology engineering firm providing tactical data solutions (including NTDS) to government and industrial clients. It is a privately held corporation Small Business. GET Engineering Corporation is a complete design, engineering and manufacturing company dedicated to providing the United States Department of Defense and its coalition forces the best data communications hardware made anywhere on earth. GET accomplishes this by utilizing its 30 years of knowledge to produce products that bridge new age technology to legacy systems.
The Corporation’s key business areas are balanced between providing superior naval tactical data related products and R&D services to over 300 customers in the Department of Defense, Foreign Military Sales (FMS) and commercial contractor community. GET provides a high level of customization by being able to implement customer requirements into our innovative products. 
GET's leading edge designs, products, and services are consistently benchmarked to rigorous quality standards from raw material to finished products. Our facility is ISO 9001:2008 Registered and complies with both IPC-A-610 Board Level Manufacturing and WHMA-A-620 Cable Assembly. Research and Development programs are completed in-house by GET employees and each program and product is subjected to extensive lab testing by GET professionals. Working with our customers and implementing their requirements into our innovative products distinguishes GET from its competition.
GET participates in a global market and is the leading supplier for commercial off-the-shelf (COTS) Naval Tactical Data System (NTDS), Airborne Tactical Data System (ATDS), and fiber/Ethernet signal conversion products. The corporate headquarters which houses our design, engineering and production facilities is located in El Cajon, California, with eleven indirect worldwide sales offices.

Name: Alpha Omega Group (AOG)
Description:

We are a Service-Disabled Veteran-Owned Small Business (SDVOSB) firm, driven by mission, grounded in purpose, and guided by a commitment to delivering value for our partners.

Name: Bevilacqua Research Corporation
Description: Founded in 1992, Bevilacqua Research Corporation (BRC) has grown to more than 200 employees serving customers in twelve states. From its roots as a high-technology modeling & simulation company, concentrating in new forms of artificial Intelligence, BRC’s core competencies have expanded to include test & evaluation, Intelligence, Surveillance and Reconnaissance (ISR), civil and structural engineering, survivability engineering, Information Technology (IT), CYBER technology, and classic technical support.

Name: Government Training Institute
Description:
GTI is a world leader in law enforcement and military tactical training. Our Programs of Instruction for state, local and federal officers has been the standard for which other training programs are judged since 2006.    

GTI's Joint Operations Center contains North America's only radiologically sterile Uranium Hexaflouride (UF6) Complex and Nuclear Fuels Reprocessing Center. Name: Rocket Propulsion Laboratory
Description:
The Rocket Propulsion Laboratory is a student organization at the University of California, San Diego founded in Spring 2017. We are dedicated to innovating in the aerospace industry, with a particular focus on rockets!

Join us on our mission to push the bounds of collegiate rocketry!

The RPL team is currently designing Ariel, a LOX/Methane engine. Innovative cooling techniques, an advanced igniter, and reliable injection put this engine in a class of its own.

Check out our website: https://rocketproplab.space

If you are interested in sponsoring this amazing team, contact us at rocket@ucsd.edu

Name: Gnostech, LLC
Description:
The Gnostech team consists of problem solvers who bring an innovative mix of knowledge and technology to the Department of Defense (DoD) and Intelligence Community (IC). With a deep understanding of our customers’ challenges and expertise in existing and emerging technologies, we rapidly deliver tailored engineering solutions to meet their mission requirements. Gnostech solutions ensure system integrity and performance in all operational domains. 

Founded in 1981, Gnostech began as a Global Positioning System (GPS)-applied engineering company in Warminster, PA, providing GPS simulation and software development support to the U.S. Navy. Over the decades, our capabilities expanded to include expertise in cybersecurity engineering and operations, software engineering and Development Security Operations (DevSecOps), Position, Navigation, and Timing (PNT) engineering and operations, and Command, Control, Communications, Computer, Intelligence, Surveillance, and Reconnaissance (C4ISR) systems engineering.

Today, we are a Service-Disabled Veteran Owned Small Business (SDVOSB). With the addition of a west coast office in San Diego, CA, we have customer sites across the country, including the greater Philadelphia region, Colorado Springs, CO, and Albuquerque, NM. 

At Gnostech, our employees are our most important asset. We believe and never fail to acknowledge that taking care of them leads to success for both our company and customers. We are committed to the professional and personal development of our workforce and are continually looking for the best talent in our industry to support Gnostech’s mission.

Name: UNITY Tactical
Description: UNITY Tactical designs and develops quality components that integrate systems and expand capability for the military, law enforcement and civilian shooting communities. Focused on optimizing the human factor, UNITY Tactical pushes the boundaries of peak performance through enhanced efficiency, comfort and safety. Founded in 2012, the company’s range of innovative products includes optics, mounts, switches, and tactical accessories used across more than 40 allied nations worldwide. UNITY Tactical also provides OEM and consulting services to brands within the defense and shooting sports vertical and beyond.

Name: Geospace
Description: Geospace provides consultancy, technology and services in the areas of business development, sales, marketing, customer scouting, customer and talent acquisition, introduction and localization to new markets and verticals, representations, training, and business management for satcom and ground segment operators, for companies operating in the space business, and for commercial space startups.

Name: A.U.G. Signals Ltd.
Description:
Founded in 1986, AUG Signals has been dedicated to excellence in signal, image and data processing for over two decades. A leader in its field, AUG is at the forefront of research and development in registration, detection, recognition, classification and identification, tracking, data mining techniques, intelligent systems and online distributed processing, situation assessment for decision support, and multi-sensor information fusion.

We have an extensive track record of successful projects, collaborating with government, academic and industry partners. AUG Signals develops customized technologies and products for its clients. We have the capabilities to deliver end-to-end solutions (data acquisition, processing, map production and online distribution) that effectively meet clients’ specifications and unique requirements. The company’s activities include airborne hyperspectral surveys; the custom implementation of Constant False Alarm Rate (CFAR) systems for Automatic Target Detection (ATD), Automatic Target Recognition (ATR) and situation assessment and decision support; the custom implementation of Image Change Detection and Automatic Multi-sensor Image Registration and Fusion systems; and online signal processing.

Concrete applications of AUG Signals technological innovations include the monitoring of drinking water and the environment, multi-sensor surveillance of maritime and land, natural resources mapping and applications for the military.

Description:

Name: Custom Microwave, Inc.
Description:
CMI was founded in 1965 for the purpose of manufacturing complex high precision microwave, millimeterwave and sub-millimeterwave passive components and assemblies for ground and space use. It has since grown to provide full services for the design, analysis, and test of space-qualified antenna feeds and components.

CMI is well-recognized throughout the industry for its high product quality and innovative design and manufacturing techniques.

CMI’s 55,000 sq. ft facility houses all necessary personnel and equipment. In-house capabilities include RF CAD design, mechanical/thermal design, manufacturing engineering, CNC mills, CNC
lathes, wire EDMs, CNC CMM, electroforming, plating, painting, and environmental testing.

CMI's quality system is certified to conform with the ISO9001:2000/AS9100 standards. CMI is an approved vendor for most aerospace companies including Lockheed Martin, Space Systems Loral, Orbital Sciences Corp., Boeing Satellite Systems, Northrop Grumman, Raytheon, Harris, NASA/JPL/GSFC, and Ball Aerospace.

Name: Expando AB
Description:
Expando provides rugged computing solutions for the defense, space and aerospace sectors in the Nordics. Our solutions are based on military grade COTS and proven solutions from world leading partners to reduce time to delivery, risks and costs to digitalize the battlefield.

Expando is a Swedish independent company, privately owned by the Tisenhult Group. Since 2000, we have been solving rugged computing and
electronics challenges for all leading Nordic defense companies and armed forces. The key is our expertise, along with close collaboration with world-leading suppliers of advanced electronics and technology. 

We offer a vast array of solutions, our largest product areas being:
• Military Grade COTS Servers and Boards, Mission Computers, Power Supply and Subsystems
• Military, Avionic and Space Components
• Flight-critical Software, Professional Services, after sales Support and Tools

We are especially proud of our own Half19" product design with rugged, high performance products such as:
• Half19" server
• Half19" server-short form factor
• Half19" NAS

We also have long experience of providing embedded graphics components, military fibre-optic transceivers and media converters.

We recognize the value of working closely with our customers to provide extensive service and support. We are your trusted partner, with in-depth understanding of the specific challenges and needs of defense, space and aerospace. 

Expando is ISO 9001:2015, ISO 14001:2015 and JOSCAR certified.

Name: El camino de los héroes
Description:
El camino de los héroes es un espacio web destinado a la divulgación de la Cultura de Defensa en favor de España y de sus Fuerzas Armadas. Originalmente como un blog, actualmente se abre camino como Centro de Pensamiento alternativo donde Carlos Delgado (creador) asesora de manera individual a empresas, instituciones y organismos en modelos de integración de una narrativa en términos de Cultura de Defensa en los discursos institucionales y de empresa y generando a la vez, un espacio en El camino de los héroes para la divulgación de la misma denominado Defensa, Cultura, Divulga: diferentes disciplinas en diversos formatos alineados para la divulgación de la Cultura de Defensa.

- #DefensaCulturaDivulga: Divulgación integral de una narrativa actualizada de la Cultura de Defensa.
- #LabIdeas: experimentación de las ideas más disruptivas. Modelos dinámicos en la Cultura de Defensa.

- Asesoramiento individual e institucional.
- Divulgación y comunicación.
- Relaciones institucionales.

Name: CONTROP-USA Inc.
Description:
Controp-USA is an independent wholly owned subsidiary of Controp Precision Technologies LTD. Controp-USA fields, integrates, and services Electro Optical Infrared (EO/IR) sensors in air, land and maritime environments to Department of Defense (DoD), Department of Homeland Security (DHS), and various local, state, and regional agencies.  We’ve maintained a presence supporting the U.S. Government End-User for over 12 years and are executing prime contracts in support of U.S. Government objectives. 

Controp-USA provides integration and field service support to our End-Users to develop unique EO/IR sensor configurations based upon US-Government specifications and requirements. Our engineering and management staffing consists of cleared former U.S. Special Operations personnel with significant operational and program management experience.  Our main product lines include: high performance stabilized observation payloads used for day/night surveillance onboard UAS, small UAS and aerostats/balloons, helicopters, light aircraft (A/C), maritime patrol boats and ground vehicles; automatic intruder detection systems for coastal and border surveillance, port/harbor security, the security of sensitive sites and ground troops security; thermal imaging cameras with high performance continuous zoom lens and state-of-the-art image enhancement features, and more.

Description:

We believe drones will play a central role in Australia’s national security and supply chain infrastructure.

Name: School of Advanced Air and Space Studies
Description: The Air Forces Advanced Studies Group develops strategists for the United States and its allies. SAASS is a degree granting institution, with qualified graduates receiving an MPhil in Military Strategy. Select graduates can receive the AU PhD in Military Strategy by completing additional training and research requirements, which is also administered through SAASS. SAASS is a school at Air University on Maxwell AFB, in Montgomery, AL. Like all university programs at Air University, SAASS is accredited through Southern Association of Colleges and Schools. All SAASS faculty, both military and civilian, have PhDs and work to provide students with the highest training, worthy of mid-career military officers who will go on to ASG billets following training.

Name: Fusion ECS
Description:
Fusion Engineering Consulting Services is a Professional Service Provider offering specialist Engineering Advisory, Integration, Design and Management services to Defence and wider industry. 
 
We are a Sovereign SME with niche technical areas of focus across the C2-C5ISREW, FPECM, UAS and complex Electrical Systems Integration streams. Our Engineers, Consultants and Technical Advisors have significant specialist experience across our focus areas and draw from careers that span across Military, Government and Industry.

We also provide a range of bespoke UAS / UAV / RPAS services across industry. Services include inspection, surveying & mapping, clearance, search & rescue operations, mission critical intelligence gathering and more. Our certified remote pilots and instructors have several years of experience with over 1,000 combined flight hours in both standard and austere conditions and environments.
 
Fusion is a Veteran owned and operated organisation. Our Veteran members have several decades of combined military service across the Australian Army and Royal Australian Navy and we also proudly support multiple active serving Defence Reservists. This experience allows us to bring a unique point of difference to our professional offering.

We have a proven track record across multiple major and complex Defence Systems Acquisition and Sustainment Programs within the Capability Lifecycle. Above all else, we value Excellence for the Warfighter, striving to ensure they are provided with capability to achieve the mission with superiority and return home safely.

Fusion Engineering Consulting Services acknowledge the traditional custodians of country throughout Australia. We pay our respect to their elders past and present and extend that respect to all Aboriginal and Torres Strait Islander peoples of today.

Our solution space ranges from subsystems integrated into the world’s most sophisticated flight simulators to elegant software add-ins that extend the capabilities of serious games.

- Radio and communications simulation

- Environmental sound simulation
