Name: Electronics Corporation of India Limited (ECIL), Department of Atomic Energy, Government of India.
Description:
ECIL is a multi-product, multi-disciplinary & multi-technology Public Sector Enterprise setup under DAE in 1967 with a vision to contribute to the country in achieving self-reliance in strategic electronics. ECIL played pioneering role in spurring the growth of indigenous electronics in the country with activities spread across verticals viz. Nuclear, Defence, Aerospace, Security, IT & E-Governance. 


Over the years, ECIL scored several ‘Firsts' in various fields, prominent among them being country's 

First Digital Computer, 
First Solid State TV, 
First C&I for Nuclear Power Plants, 
First Earth Station Antenna, 
First Computerised Operator Information System, 
First Radiation Monitoring & Detection Systems, 
First Automatic Message Switching Systems, 
First Operation & Maintenance Centre For E-108 Exchange, First PLC, 
First Solid State Cockpit Voice Recorder, 
First Electronic Voting Machines etc. 

The expanded scope of self-reliance enabled the organisation to develop various products to cater to the needs of Defence, Civil Aviation, Information & Broadcasting, Telecommunications, Insurance, Banking, Police, and Para-Military Forces, Oil & Gas, Power, Space Education, Health, Agriculture, Steel and Coal sectors and various user departments in the Government domain.


Vision
To contribute to the country in acheving self reliance in strategic electronics.

Mission
ECIL's mission is to consolidate its status as a valued national asset in the area of strategic electronics with specific focus on Atomic Energy, Defence, Security and such critical sectors of strategic national importance.

Name: International Armored Group
Description:
International Armored Group is a quality conscious manufacturer of armored vehicles, providing customized armoring solutions for Private Security Protection, Government and Law Enforcement and Cash-In-Transit industries.  Our vehicle like up includes armored SUVs, pick-ups and sedans,  armored buses and minibuses, Anti-Riot vehicles, Armored Personnel Carriers and “Cash-in-Transit” vehicles. 

IAG has grown substantially over the past 30 years to become one of the most modern and technologically advanced armored vehicle manufacturers in the world and the largest privately owned armored vehicle supplier. We currently have 8 global offices and three manufacturing facilities located in the United States, United Arab Emirates and Turkey. 

With combined state-of-the-art  manufacturing space of over 350,000 sq. ft and over 500 personnel worldwide, IAG provides top quality products using IAG’s Smartarmor technology to effectively protect occupants from ballistic and blast threats. We are ISO 9001:2000 certified for design, manufacture and supply of custom built armored vehicles for VIP protection, military/law enforcement and cash in transit industry.  We were the first company in the world to receive VPAM BRV 2009 VR7 certification for our armored Toyota Land Cruiser 300 series.  

Our armored vehicles are used by national governments, national militaries, and international organizations such as the U.N and NATO. Our vehicles effectively operate in some of the most hostile environments on the globe, when it comes to protection there is no other. 

Visit us on Facebook: 
https://www.facebook.com/interarmored

Name: BIRD Aerosystems
Description:
BIRD Aerosystems: Where Innovation Meets Performance

BIRD Aerosystems is a leading global provider of innovative airborne solutions that protect our customers and ensure the security of their assets.
Founded in 2001, privately-owned and based in Israel, BIRD develops and markets advanced airborne missile protection systems and airborne surveillance, information and observation solutions. Leveraging deep in-house technical know-how, BIRD also provides world-class aviation logistics services to large-scale commercial and governmental customers.
BIRD provides end-to-end, turnkey solutions. From operational analysis, system design, integration and installation through ground and flight testing and including system certification – BIRD is truly a one-stop-shop. These objectives have been achieved, facilitating strong customer satisfaction and continuous growth. We maintain a corporate culture that fosters a leadership approach that emphasizes communication, coaching and collaboration. We focus on employee development and performance enhancement, and reward superior performance. Our excellent work environment, pay, benefits, and management approach keep retention well above industry averages.

Achieve deep customer understanding and deliver quality in every effort we perform 
Develop and provide in-depth capabilities in our key business competencies 
Implement, and continuously improve, process-driven performance in all our actions 
Attract quality personnel and foster their superior performance

Our employees are dedicated to the long-term success of optronics design, prototyping and manufacturing of a wide range of sophisticated observation and sighting products in South Africa.

Our products cover the land, sea and air domains and are used by military forces and security operators worldwide, on platforms ranging from submarines, land vehicles to helicopters, UAVs and fighter aircraft.

Name: Space Inventor
Description:
Space Inventor is a second-generation New Space company, founded and operating in Denmark since 2015. Our promise is to Make space for progress, first listening and responding to our clients’ objectives to then develop and deliver advanced satellites for government, security, commercial and science purposes.

Our approach to building satellites is “flexible modularity” – reliable, customised solutions built from standardized, proven modules designed for mission-specific success. We manufacture approximately 95% of our satellite subsystems in house with modern production equipment, such as 5-axis CNC machines and pick-and-place lines to ensure precision, traceability, and high operational reliability.

Deep vertical integration empowers our in-house innovations, quality control, adaptability, and speed of delivery. From our own facilities we offer complete, robust and stable solutions, from subsystem development to integration and full environmental testing for micro- nano-, and larger satellites.

Our 100+ person team consists of experienced specialists with practical experience across the entire satellite life cycle. Space Inventor headquarters are located in Aalborg, and we have a development and project office in Copenhagen. In addition, we are expanding with an office in Leuven, Belgium, to strengthen our role in the European space sector.

Name: Chenega Professional Services Strategic  Business Unit
Description:
The Professional Services Strategic Business Unit (PS SBU) specializes in providing Information Technology, Health and Scientific, Engineering and Technical Support, Professional Management and Administrative Services to Federal Government Civilian Agencies. The PS SBU 8(a) companies include Chenega Government Consulting, LLC (CGC), Time Solutions, LLC (TSLLC) ,Chenega Professional and Technical Services, LLC (CPTS) and Chenega Enterprise Systems & Solutions, LLC (ChESS). The PS SBU provides each company shared support, including human resources, recruiting, contracting, marketing, administration, finance & accounting, business development, and security, allowing each company to focus on their customers in their day to day operations. Our personnel provide a range of support to several different federal agencies including the Department of Energy (DOE), Department of Justice (DOJ), The Federal Bureau of Investigations(FBI), The Drug Enforcement Administration(DEA), The United States Agency for International Development(USAID), The National Security Agency(NSA), Department of Homeland Security (DHS), the Department of Education (EDU), General Services Administration (GSA), the Food and Drug Administration (FDA), Centers for Medicare and Medicaid Services (CMS), and the Centers for Disease Control and Prevention (CDC).

Name: GEW Technologies
Description:
HENSOLDT GEW is a system engineering company specialising in the design and production of sophisticated communication monitoring, electronic attack and security products and systems. For more than half a century, GEW has been providing clients across the world with the capability to detect and protect in contemporary defence and civil operating environments. Whether on land, at sea or in the air, GEW’s field-proven technologies detect, collect and evaluate with agility and precision. GEW is proud to form part of the HENSOLDT family – a global pioneer of technology and innovation in the area of defence and security electronics.

Military – signal intelligence solutions ranging from monitoring, direction finding and jamming solutions to command and control systems.

Spectrum management and monitoring – products and systems ideal for the ITU monitoring environment.

Security – integrated security and signal-intelligence solutions for strategic infrastructure.

Description: Portsmouth Naval Shipyard's mission is the safe overhaul, repair and modernization of the U.S. Navy's nuclear-powered attack submarine fleet, specifically Los Angeles and Virginia-class submarines.

Name: Avon Protection
Description:
Avon Protection is recognised as a world leader in CBRN protection and underwater systems, delivering mission-critical solutions for military, law enforcement & first responders worldwide.

As an innovative capability provider, Avon Protection understand the unique requirements of the modern warfighter and tactical operator. This depth of specialisation and understanding has ensured products are designed to protect users in the most extreme of environments.

Avon Protection are proud to have supplied protection solutions to the UK Ministry of Defence and other allies since the 1920’s and remain the primary supplier of integrated protective equipment to NATO and the United States Department of Defense Army, Navy, Marines, Air Force and Special Operations Forces.

Name: ORIZZONTE SISTEMI NAVALI S.p.A.
Description:
Orizzonte Sistemi Navali (OSN) is an Italian company, consisting of Fincantieri (51%) and Leonardo (49%), the main Italian industrial Groups operating worldwide in the Defense Sector.

The Company has more than 20 years’ experience in integrated naval systems and support services, human factor requirement studies, integrated logistics support for the Whole Warship Life cycle and training solutions.

OSN is the system integrator of the FREMM Programme for the construction of 10 frigates for the Italian Navy and, on the foreign market, for the construction of amphibious assault ships and mine countermeasures vessels.

Name: Economat des armées
Description:
L’Economat des Armées (EdA) est une centrale d’achat et un prestataire de services dédié au soutien des formations administratives de la défense.

Fort d’un millier de collaborateurs aux savoir-faire multiples, cet établissement public de nature commerciale, dont le chiffre d’affaires s’est élevé pour 2006 à 160 millions d’euros, est sous tutelle du ministère de la défense.

L’EdA exerce ses activités au quotidien, au profit des forces armées et de la gendarmerie nationale dans des conditions très diversifiées, sur le territoire national, en métropole et outre-mer, et à l’étranger, en opérations extérieures notamment sous l’égide de l’ONU, l’UE ou l’OTAN.

L’EdA est une entreprise façonnée par l’histoire des forces armées françaises qui de très longue date lui ont confié une partie substantielle du soutien des unités, des militaires qui les servent ainsi que, dans certaines circonstances, de leurs familles.

Ses cœurs de métier sont les approvisionnements en denrées alimentaires, la restauration collective, la fourniture de biens et de services généraux, la gestion de libres-services ainsi que des prestations de plus en plus variées dans le domaine des transports et de la gestion de camps.

Name: MESKO S.A.
Description:
MESKO’s main task is to supply with an increasingly modern and high quality ammunition and rockets the Polish Armed Forces and other bodies responsible for national security by implementing the most advanced technologies.
Integrated management system operates in our company complying with the requirements of ISO 9001:2008, ISO 14001:2004, PN-N 18001:2004, AQAP 2110:2009 and requirements of the Act of 29 November 2000 determining the supervisory manner and procedures on international trade in “strategic importance products”.

Mesko S.A. with its headquarters in Skarżysko – Kamienna has started to operate in 1924, initially as National Ammunition Factory. Celebrating it's almost 100 years of existence, MESKO S.A. is leading manufacturer of Ammunition- Rocket Group, which was established within Polish Defense Industry  consolidation.  The group is composed of Dezamet S.A., ZCh Nitro-Chem S.A.,BZE Belma S.A., Gamrat Sp. z o.o. and other former companies, which were incorporated  and now they are branches of Mesko S.A. -  WSK Warszawa II, ZM Kraśnik, FPS Bolechowo and ZPS Pionki. 

The company is the producer  of world-class products and assemblies for ammunition and rockets used by Polish Armed Forces and entities responsible for national security and eligible supplier for NATO troops. The company has also the most modern demilitarization facilities in Europe.

Name: Noetic Strategies, Inc.
Description:
Noetic is a dynamic, technical small business where bright minds harness the power of leading technology to enhance security in our networked world.

At Noetic, we pursue our mission of protecting the American experience by applying our innovations and technical excellence across more than 10 Federal DoD and Civilian organizations including those in Defense, Homeland Security, and Intelligence. Noetic is an 8(a), WOSB, HUBZone certified small business. Our contract vehicles include GSA STARS III, GSA MAS, and SeaPort NxG. Noetic is an 8(a), WOSB, HUBZone certified small business. Our capabilities include software development, cybersecurity, advanced analytics, intelligence analysis, and information technology.

Name: DAWSON
Description:
DAWSON is a Native Hawaiian global business enterprise whose highly skilled and specialized staff, in-place management systems, and responsive global reach bring a depth of expertise and versatility to its Construction, Environmental, Operations and Maintenance, and Professional and Technical Services.

Established in 1994, DAWSON has more than two decades of experience delivering innovative and cost-effective solutions to our customers' most challenging problems. DAWSON’s strong entrepreneurial spirit, determined leadership, and commitment to Kupono Ka Hana – Excellence in Service – have enabled the firm to rapidly expand its service offerings and geographic breadth of capabilities.

Today, with offices throughout the Pacific Rim and Continental US, and strategic partners in more than 60 locations worldwide, DAWSON possesses the agility and accessibility of a financially strong small business with a large business presence. This advantage makes us well-positioned to deliver innovative and integrated solutions designed to meet the emerging global needs of our commercial and federal clients. 

DAWSON provides services to the Department of Defense, other federal agencies, and commercial clients at locations across the globe.

Top Talent
DAWSON actively seeks to hire and retain the best-in-class employees who can deliver innovative and best-value solutions to complex problems. Our responsive professional teams' dedication, knowledge, and skills ensure outstanding performance.

Description:
Civitanavi Systems is a leading player in design and manufacture high-tech solutions of Navigation, Control and Stabilization Systems for many applications, in Aerospace, Defense and Industrial sectors. The use of proprietary methods and technologies based on FOG and MEMS technology, enables the Company to best meet the specific needs of its Customers. Name: LGS Innovations
Description:
LGS Innovations is a technology company delivering mission-critical communications products, R&D, and supporting services to U.S. defense, intelligence, and civilian agencies, state and local governments, critical infrastructure operators, and commercial customers around the world. We create advanced solutions in wireless communications, signals processing and analysis, optical networking, photonics, routing and switching, and spectrum management. 
These solutions drive mission success in Command, Control, Communications, Computers, Intelligence, Surveillance and Reconnaissance (C4ISR), cyberspace operations, and network assurance. By incorporating best-in-class commercial and custom technologies with a full suite of offerings in research and development, engineering, integration, and product applications, our solutions improve efficiency, reduce costs, and provide an information advantage to our customers. 
LGS has a history and culture of innovation, and maintains strong ties to our Bell Labs legacy of inventive development. Our intellectual curiosity keeps us on the cutting edge of technology and leverages our 75-year history of creating next-generation communications solutions to support critical operations.
LGS Innovations is a U.S.-owned company headquartered in Herndon, Virginia, with offices across the U.S. and overseas. We employ more than 1,200 associates around the world, including 750 scientists and engineers. Do you have a passion for innovation? So do we. Learn more at www.lgsinnovations.com.

Name: TMS Support Solutions Ltd
Description:
TMS Support Solutions Ltd is a leading supplier of Integrated Logistic Support, Technical Publications, Training, Safety and Environmental Cases, Software Design, Data Management, Translations, Through Life Support and Operational Support Systems to both the Defence and Commercial Markets in the UK and overseas.

Acting as a ‘one-stop shop’ for all your company’s product support requirements, with over twenty years’ experience, TMS prides itself on having a broad understanding of different industries and will apply a unique combination of expertise and technology to provide you with the most cost effective service.

As a proud signatory of the Armed Forces Covenant and a holder of the Silver Employer Recognition Award, TMS are dedicated to supporting our armed forces and veterans.  With our company founder and more than 85% of our work force coming from a military background,  we believe supporting those who served is paramount. 

Accreditation and Certification:

ISO 9001:2015
ISO 14001:2015
Cyber Essentials Plus
JOSCAR Stage 2
Microsoft Gold Partner

Name: DGNUM - Direction générale du numérique et des SIC
Description:
Créée en 2018 à l’initiative de Mme Florence Parly, Ministre des Armées, la Direction générale du numérique et des systèmes d’information et de communication (DGNUM) succède à la DGSIC.

 Sa mission principale est : 

 Proposer la politique ministérielle et assurer la cohérence d’ensemble du système d’information et de communication (SIC) de la défense, en concertation avec le CEMA, le DGA et le SGA qui en assurent la mise en œuvre. 

 Ses activités : 

 Animer la politique du numérique et des SIC au sein des instances de gouvernance.
 Participer à la cohérence de la mise en œuvre de la politique du numérique et des SIC (vision stratégique, encadrement du développement, accompagnement des métiers dans leurs projets).
 Apporter une expertise ou être tête de chaîne vis-à-vis de stratégies sectorielles (donnée, fréquences, ressources humaines, sécurité numérique et transformation des métiers notamment).

La DGNUM, au cœur de l’écosystème des acteurs du numérique :

C’est par des forces unies que la DGNUM, fidèle à sa devise « Lunctis Viribus » , se place au cœur d’un vaste écosystème composé d’experts des mondes civils et militaires. 

La DGNUM agit en lien étroit avec le cabinet de la Ministre, les opérateurs (DIRISI), les grands subordonnés (EMA, DGA, SGA) et en relation avec les acteurs interministériels (DINUM) et ceux de l’écosystème numérique national et international.

Name: MILMAST
Description:
MILMAST is manufacturer of Carbon and Fiber Composite and Aluminum Telescopic Military Masts (MIL-STD-810G, MIL-STD-461E, MIL-STD-1275D) that optimize the performance of; C4ISR systems, optical surveillance systems, fire control systems and communication systems with advanced Integrated Logistics Support (ILS). The company also designs, engineers and manufactures Military Trailer and Mounted Integrated Solutions that operates with an ISO 9001: 2015 certified quality system.

The company’s advanced Telescopic Mast solutions enable optimum performance of land, naval and air platforms. It's All-Aluminum Military Trailer solutions deliver significantly lower life-cycle costs and increased performance over standard trailers constructed of metal.

Name: ABSC (Absolute Business Solutions Corp.)
Description:
ABSC is a technology and services company that combines the agility of a small business with proven processes refined over more than two decades in business supporting public sector clients in the Intelligence, Defense, Health, and Safety areas.

Our big data, behavioral intelligence, and predictive analytics products and services span a wide range of critical mission areas. Our intelligence and predictive analytics foundations have expanded us into various mission areas, launching commercial products, and we continue to invest and prototype AI/ML, and data science solutions. The ABSC ideal solution is comprised of a customized behavioral analytics technology designed to provide strategic and operational decision makers, analysts, and operators with the ability to gain a clearer understanding of the global operational environment. We help customers prepare, plan, and engage in full spectrum operations with confidence.

Our commitment to advancing artificial intelligence and machine learning solutions through continual investment, development, and iteration is part of our corporate DNA. Our commitment coupled with our company Values, propels us to put data to work for our clients, allowing them to focus, prepare, and engage in complex global missions with confidence.

Interested to learn more about our solutions as we democratize data analytics, set a higher bar for predictive analytics, and grow our team of skilled professionals? Learn more about us on our website or contact us at info@absc-us.com . If you're looking to chat about our career opportunities send us a message at careers@absc-us.com - a new and exciting opportunity to grow with us as we expand into larger markets is waiting for you!

Name: Space Launch Delta 45
Description:
As the World's Premier Gateway to Space, Space Launch Delta 45 delivers assured space launch, range and combat capabilities for the nation. 

Control of the battlefield begins here.

Our mission can be broken down into four areas: Eastern Range operations, launch operations and support, expeditionary and contingency readiness, and base and people support. 

The Space Launch Delta 45 Eastern Range operations team provides the activities and resources for safety of flight, range instrumentation, infrastructure, and scheduling required to support and assure space and ballistic launches, and other operations. 

The Space Launch Delta 45 launch operations and support personnel provide reliable launch infrastructure, launch teams, and seamless partnership with launch and satellite programs. 

The Space Launch Delta 45 expeditionary and contingency readiness personnel provide trained people, equipment, and processes ready to support wartime and contingency operations. 

In order to support the base and our people, Space Launch Delta 45 maintains the base infrastructure, provides health care services, security, information systems, morale/welfare activities, workforce safety, human resources, financial services, logistics services, and environmental stewardship to support present and future missions.

Name: Northrop Grumman Italia
Description:
Possible starts at NGI because we do what it takes to do what’s never been done.
We handle the challenge of the market’s changes, developing navigation solutions with a high level of customization for Airborne, Land and Space domain, promoting an innovative and digital oriented approach.
We have been operating with curiosity, devotion and innovation for over 60 years, taking care of customer satisfaction as well as ensuring high quality products and services.
Northrop Grumman Italia S.P.A., also known as NGI, is the Italian subsidiary of the Northrop Grumman Corporation – Mission System Europe, and It is located in Pomezia (Rome).
The company, formerly Litton Italia, founded in 1961, joined the Northrop Grumman Corporation in 2001.
NGI is a national and European center of excellence for the development and production of ITAR FREE avionics equipment, navigation and positioning systems. Applications where reliability and accuracy are the key point of the mission’s success. 
Over the years the company has developed a portfolio of ITAR FREE products and technologies, which allowed us to increase clients as well as to become one of the main players in the international military navigation field. Our ten years’ presence in the main European programs is proof of this.

Name: The Buffalo Group
Description:
The Buffalo Group, a Jacobs company, is a professional services firm that has a small company culture with a big family feel. It is our goal to provide you, the employee, with a unique corporate environment that promotes career advancement as well as personal growth. In an atmosphere with an established corporate infrastructure and diligent program management, we can provide our clients with the agility and flexibility of a small business, as well as with knowledge and experience often found in the Fortune 500.

It is only through the dedicated utilization of our steadfast teamwork and cooperation that we can deliver on our company promise to our customers, “Mission First.”

Please visit our website at www.thebuffalogroup.com

Name: INVISIO
Description:
INVISIO offers cutting-edge personal communication and hearing protection systems. The systems enable users to operate and communicate safely and clearly in all environments, even under extreme conditions, such as loud noise, heat, and underwater. 

INVISIO systems consist of headsets and advanced control units that interface to a wide range of communication devices. The systems provide hearing protection while maintaining the natural level of situational awareness. 

Customers are mainly from the public sector. Sales are made via a global network of partners and to some extent directly to end customers.

Name: Bluefin Robotics
Description:
Bluefin Robotics, now part of General Dynamics Mission Systems, develops, manufactures, and operates Autonomous Underwater Vehicles (AUVs) and related unmanned underwater technologies for defense, commercial, and scientific customers worldwide. We offer a full range of modular, free-flooded AUV platforms. As a full AUV lifecycle provider, we offering research and development expertise, technology integration, full-scale manufacturing, platform training, and operations support. No other provider has our depth and breadth of expertise and resources dedicated exclusively to AUV development and production.

About General Dynamics Mission Systems
In February 2016, Bluefin Robotics was acquired by General Dynamics Mission Systems, a business unit of General Dynamics. Name: Gilat Wavestream
Description:
Wavestream sets the standard in the design and manufacture of next generation high power solid state amplifiers. Wavestream’s family of Ka, Ku and X-band Solid State Power Amplifiers (SSPA), Block Upconverters (BUC) and transceivers provide system integrators with field-proven, high performance solutions designed for Ground, Sea and Airborne  satellite communication systems worldwide.
What sets Wavestream products apart from traditional amplifier solutions is our innovative Spatial advantEdge technology. This unique, patented technology allows us to generate higher output power in lighter, more compact product packages that use less energy and are more reliable. Wavestream’s powerful solutions are designed to replace aging, less efficient amplifiers, helping systems integrators get the performance they need while reducing energy and maintenance costs over the lifecycle of the system.
Wavestream’s reputation for technical innovation and high standards for quality, reliability and performance has led to our continued growth and ability to offer customers leading-edge products and superior customer service to support mission-critical satellite communication systems anywhere in the world. We invite you to explore our website to learn more about Wavestream and how our products can add value to your satellite communication solutions.

Join the satellite communications revolution

With analysts indicating a growth trajectory for the satellite communications market segment well into the next decade, Wavestream is well positioned as a leader to capitalize on our world’s insatiable appetite for connectivity, anytime, anywhere. On the ground, in the air, or out at sea, Wavestream has the technology to power this growing need.

People are at the heart and soul of our company. Together we meet challenges and face opportunities head on, constantly expanding our potential to address the needs of the markets we serve. If you are looking for a place where you can join a winning team, with a proven track record of success, look no further.

Wavestream brings together the brightest minds, from diverse backgrounds, to solve real problems using our unique technology and fresh approach for commercial and military satellite communication needs all over the world. Whether you’re just out of college or an experienced professional, Wavestream has an extensive range of career opportunities just waiting for you.

At Maxim Defense, we design, engineer, and manufacture premium firearms, suppressors, and accessories for commercial, military, and law enforcement buyers. Our mission is simple: deliver purpose-designed, performance-driven, duty-built solutions that excel in the most demanding conditions.
 
With a reputation for quality and precision, we partner with OEMs, distributors, and dealers to bring cutting-edge products to market. From our innovative Roller Delayed Buffer (RDB) System and industry-award-winning suppressors and firearms to our high-performance stocks and braces, Maxim Defense strives to stay at the forefront of tactical innovation.
 
We don’t just create firearms—we deliver solutions that enhance mission success and meet the highest standards of excellence.

Whether you're seeking high-performance products for yourself or your customers, or you're looking for OEM opportunities to expand your product offerings. Let’s discuss how we can support your needs.

Name: ANDAR Electromechanical Systems
Description:
Since 2012, ANDAR has been a leader in designing and manufacturing high-performance electromechanical actuators. Our multidisciplinary team brings deep expertise to every stage of actuation systems, from concept through to component production. We are committed to delivering the most effective and reliable actuation solutions for the aviation and defense sectors.

ANDAR takes a vertically integrated approach, handling all engineering, development, and production in-house.This approach ensures complete control over every phase, guaranteeing the highest standards of integrity, quality, and performance in our products. We adhere to SAE ARPs, ensuring our development and production processes meet the most rigorous aerospace and defense qualification and certification standards.

We design and develop 100% of our products, including electromechanical actuators, precise motors, transmissions, structural elements, controllers, and drivers. Our in-house capabilities extend to producing our own production machines and testing platforms, enabling us to exceed industry standards and surpass customer expectations.

Visit our website to learn more about our COTS products, customization options, and specialized services !

Description:
NSI-MI Technologies is the leading global supplier of antenna, RF, and microwave testing equipment. With a team of highly respected technical experts, we are committed to providing top-notch engineering solutions and advanced products for a wide range of industries that require precise measurement, motion control, and data acquisition.

Drawing upon our extensive knowledge in microwave technologies, electromagnetic propagation, and mechanical system design, we offer comprehensive antenna test systems for aerospace, defense, wireless communications, transportation industries, as well as academia and research institutes. Additionally, our diverse product line enables us to provide solutions for production line or general automated component testing.

Whether you are in need of a turnkey system, a precision component, or access to our state-of-the-art in-house testing facilities, we have the perfect solution for you. At NSI-MI Technologies, we prioritize your confidence by offering reliable and accurate testing capabilities. 

Test with Confidence at NSI-MI.

Name: Moon Express
Description:
Moon Express, Inc. (MoonEx) is a privately funded commercial space company blazing a trail to the Moon to unlock its mysteries and resources with low cost robotic spacecraft products & services using exponential technologies. Driven by long-term goals of exploring and developing lunar resources for the benefit of humanity, the company has short-term business on-ramps of providing lunar transportation and services for government and commercial customers. NASA partnered with Moon Express in 2014 under its Lunar CATALYST program to help build the capability to return the United States to the surface of the Moon. In October 2015, Moon Express announced a launch contract with Rocket Lab USA for 3 launches to the Moon beginning in 2017. In 2016, Moon Express announced an agreement with the U.S. Air Force to utilize Cape Canaveral Launch Complexes 17 and 18 for the development of its spacecraft. 

The Moon Express founders, Dr. Robert (Bob) Richards, Naveen Jain, and Dr. Barney Pell, believe in the long-term economic potential of the Moon to produce resources essential to humanity's future on Earth and in space. 

For more information about Moon Express, visit: www.moonexpress.com

To reach the Moon with us: http://www.indeed.com/cmp/Moon-Express,-Inc.

METIS provides training and education, intelligence and operations support, and program management services to U.S. government and commercial clients around the globe.  Our Senior Leaders, Subject Matter Experts, and Operational Specialists have direct, on-the-ground expertise in planning and executing the most critical missions our country and business sectors have faced – with current operations ongoing in the Middle East, South Asia, Afghanistan, Latin America, Europe, or Africa.
 
We offer experience in addressing today’s hardest problems.

ANI achieves this through the effective ownership and management of facilities such as the Osborne Naval Shipyard.

Name: Silentium Defence
Description:
A global leader in the design and deployment of cutting-edge passive surveillance systems, Silentium Defence is redefining situational awareness. For a demonstration of our passive radar Solutions for Defence and Space, contact our team.

Silentium Defence specialise in crafting low Size, Weight, and Power (SWaP) systems engineered for the toughest conditions to provide cost-effective situational awareness across air, land, sea and space.

At Silentium Defence, we go beyond the ordinary, offering solutions that empower organisations to protect what matters - anytime, anywhere. Our state-of-the-art systems are tailored to meet the critical surveillance and traffic management demands of high-end customers across the defence and commercial industries. We pride ourselves on developing technology that provides real-time situational awareness without highlighting your presence.

Our passive radar surveillance systems have no electromagnetic signature and enable you to detect objects discreetly, giving you the upper hand in defining risks and confidently deciding on the best course of action to protect your assets. We offer a range of products and services across defence, space and critical infrastructure protection:

- Mobile Solutions
- Situational Awareness Solutions
- Performance Prediction Tools
- Research and Development
- Space Data
- Drone Detection Capability
- Airspace monitoring and management

Silentium Defence is more than a surveillance provider; we're your strategic ally in advancing the future of situational awareness. For a demonstration of our Defence or Space passive radar Solutions, contact our team today.

Name: SPACEMEDEX
Description:
At SPACEMEDEX, we push the boundaries between space exploration and human health. Launched in 2015 and based in Sophia-Antipolis - near Nice, our mission is clear: to turn the physiological challenges of spaceflight into groundbreaking medical innovations for life on Earth.

We lead our R&D programs and collaborate with research institutes, hospitals, and industry leaders to:

- Optimize human performance in extreme conditions (microgravity, hypogravity, hypergravity, radiation).

- Ensure medical safety for crewed missions, from space tourism to future lunar and Martian expeditions.

- Accelerate medical breakthroughs by translating space-based technologies into real-world healthcare solutions (rehabilitation, telemedicine, neuroscience, robotics, smart biosensors).

Together with key partners in space and healthcare, we are developing tangible solutions to:

- Advance regenerative and rehabilitative medicine.

- Reinforce telemedicine and remote health monitoring.

- Deploy robotic assistance and biofeedback systems.

Our vision: preparing tomorrow’s healthcare by exploring the limits of human adaptation in space—while improving quality of life on Earth.

Join us on this journey where space medicine inspires the most innovative solutions for humanity.

Description:
Hydroacoustics Inc. (HAI) began in 1972 as a spin-off based on acoustics research initiated at Harvard University and further developed at General Dynamics Corporation.

For 50 years, HAI has been a world leader in the design and manufacture of unique high power, broadband, low frequency and underwater acoustic sources based on continuous wave and impulse technology. HAI has been awarded over 50 U.S. and foreign patents.

Today, HAI offers fully integrated design, manufacturing and testing capabilities that include specialized mathematical analysis and modeling, on-going research and development, procurement, quality control and assembly, and both in-lab and customer-site calibration. We can also provide computer performance modeling, engineering and design support for broadband acoustic sources, and hardware and services support.

Dedicated to improving our national military defenses through innovations in
acoustic technology, HAI maintains in-house and customer-site maintenance and repair capabilities, and can develop specialized products for specific customer applications for both military or commercial requirements.

In the energy sector, reducing upstream carbon intensity is a focus of our Oil Recovery Tool (ORT). The ORT is a robust, reliable and replicable improved oil recovery (IOR) technology that requires no drilling and no chemicals. It leverages our patented technology to increase oil production from existing wells and helps support responsible oil production.

Name: CBRNE Ltd
Description:
CBRNE Ltd is a UK-based professional-services SME strengthening resilience against chemical, biological, radiological, nuclear and explosive (CBRNE) threats for defence, security and critical-infrastructure stakeholders. For over two decades we’ve blended behavioural science, human-factors engineering and ethical governance to help organisations anticipate, mitigate and recover from high-consequence risks. 

As a trusted partner in the EU research ecosystem we have delivered work-packages in more than a dozen FP7, Horizon 2020 and Horizon Europe projects. Examples include IMCOSEC on container-supply-chain security, D-BOX humanitarian de-mining, PANDEM-2 pandemic preparedness, and ULTIMATE, advancing hybrid-AI situational awareness. Our contributions span ethical & societal impact assessment, training design, large-scale validation exercises and exploitation planning.

Building on this track-record we now offer AI ORA – the Organisational Readiness Accelerator: a structured programme that demystifies AI, benchmarks your readiness and delivers a board-level roadmap for responsible adoption aligned with emerging EU AI regulation. The service provides an instant AI score through three short questionnaires and converts the results into a phased transformation plan.

Whether you need a consortium partner, a work-package lead or a practical path to deploy AI safely, CBRNE Ltd brings evidence-based insight, European reach and a reputation for making complex challenges manageable. Let’s build resilience together.

Name: RAM Laboratories, Inc.
Description:
RAM Laboratories conducts innovative research, technology development, and prototyping for the most urgent missions.

Research Driven
Research is the soul of the company, and has been at the forefront from our earliest days. RAM Laboratories was founded by Dr. Richard MacDonald and Dr. Robert McGraw who met while pursuing their Doctorates in Electrical Engineering at the University of Virginia. Based on their technical interests, they collaborated on developing novel modeling and simulation technologies at UVa’s Center for SemiCustom Integrated Systems. 

Transitioning Ideas from Concept to Reality
With this common background, RAM Laboratories was formed to bring technologies out of the laboratory into the real world. Our initial endeavors applied modeling and simulation technologies to next-generation avionics for the Air Force. We have evolved to address challenges in the fields of advanced analytics, cyber security, mobile devices and networks.

Established Trusted Business Partner
Since 1997, we have provided services and technologies for commercial partners and major programs and agencies in the Department of Defense and Department of Homeland Security. RAM Laboratories is a prime contractor on SEAPORT NxG, which spans the entire spectrum of C4ISR mission areas and technical capabilities supported by the Department of Navy. In addition, we are an active member of the Information Warfare Research Project, National Spectrum, Naval Surface Technology and Innovation, and the Systems of Systems consortiums; developing and maturing technologies in these fields. 

RAM Laboratories is a registered small business, headquartered in San Diego, California.

Description:

Name: MAPSAT S.r.l.
Description:
Mapsat is a company for geo-spatial services in Italy, with a strong focus on delivering operational services for urban development, offering a broad range of geo-information services and applications, ranging from satellite data reception (Terra, Aqua, EROS-B, Suomi NPP), geo-data procurement (satellite data, DEM, land use and land cover data), image processing and analysis, information processing and software development, to the provision of turn-key technical assistance projects and customized spatial land management and monitoring systems. 
The company was born with the aim of developing innovative products/services based on remote sensing, for the public (civil and military) and private market, focused on territorial control, environmental monitoring and security of citizens.
In September 2015, MAPSAT acquired the control of MARSec (Mediterranean Agency for Remote Sensing and Environmental Control), in Benevento, a center able to plan and receive data from high-resolution optical satellites. 
The Mapsat Ground Station consists of a X-band and a L-band antenna (both provided by SeaSpace) - to receive VHR satellite data and Nasa EOS data - and of a UHF antenna (made by M2 Antenna Systems Inc) configured for communication with nano and micro satellites, both for Earth Observation and for Machine2Machine (M2M) missions.

Name: TUMA SAVUNMA
Description:
TUMA MAKİNA 2004 yılında faaliyete geçmiş olup günümüze kadar Otomotiv,Güneş Enerji Sistemleri ve Savunma Sanayi sektörüne parça imalatı yapmaktadır.

2200 m2 kapalı, 500 m2 açık alanda faaliyet gösteren firmamızda kaynaklı ve talaşlı imalatta hassas toleranslar dahilinde parça üretimi yapılmaktadır.
Kaynak bölümünde özel olarak firmamızın yetiştirdiği ve sertifikalı olan ekibimizle kalite şartlarını yerine getirerek müşterilerimizin memnuniyetini sağlamaktayız.

VİZYONUMUZ..
Makine-parça imalatında ve kaynak işlemlerinde yurt içinde ve yurt dışında kalitesiyle tercih edilen ve güvenilen bir firma olmak.

MİSYONUMUZ..
Sürekli değişen rekabet ortamına uyum sağlayabilmek ve müşterilerimizin beklentilerine cevap verebilmek için, kuruluşumuzda Kalite Yönetim sistemini benimseyerek etkinliğini değerlendirip sürekli iyileştirmeyi sağlamak, konusunda uzman personelimizle, teknolojik gelişmeleri,yasal gereklilikleri, faaliyetimize yansıtılarak, kaliteyi en üst düzeyde tutmaktadır.

POLİTİKAMIZ..
Müşteri memnuniyeti odaklı çalışarak, müşterilerle sürekli işbirliği içerisinde olmak ve beklentilerini, ilgli mevzuat şartlarını göz önüne alarak en kısa sürede doğru olarak karşılamak ve talepleri doğrultusunda yeni tasarımlara açık olmak.Kalite kontrole önem vererek müşteri şikayetlerini en aza indirmektir.

Personelimizin, sağlıklı bir iş ortamında, gelecek kaygıları olmadan çalışmalarını sağlamak ve her çalışanımıza göre eğitim programlarının düzenlenmesi ile kişisel becerilerini artırmaktır.

Tedarikçilerimizle olan ilişkilerimizde sürekliliği sağlayıcı çalışmalar yaparak iş hacmimizi birlikte artırmak.

Topluma ve çevreye duyarlı bir firma olarak kanuni mevzuatlara uyarak, standartların gereklerini yerine getirmektir.

Firmamıza yapılmış olan yatırımların kaliteden taviz vermeden en kısa süre içeresinde kazançlı bir şekilde geri dönmesi için gerekli çalışmaları yapmaktır.

Name: ASPIRE H2020
Description:
Future Space Exploration and Transportation challenges do all rely on an efficient and reliable propulsion system. In-orbit satellite servicing and transferring (Tug) spacecrafts are a few examples of the several architectures understudy to tackle the orbital debris problem and to enable more advanced robotic and eventually
manned interplanetary missions. Among all technological solutions being devised in the context of these architectures, high-power electric propulsion systems play a fundamental role. In fact, considering the technology maturity, operation flexibility and thrust-to-power ratio requirements of the exploration/transportation concepts, high-power 20kW-class power Hall thrusters represent ideal solutions.

Name: Particle Technology Ltd
Description:
Particle Technology Ltd offers a diverse range of quality products and services that aim to reduce costs and improve efficiency and reliability to new and existing customers worldwide.

Test Dust & Contaminants
Many companies use a range of Test Dusts to check a products performance and reliability, these tests could be to ensure that vacuum cleaners are effective and efficient, to making sure aircraft and automotive filtration systems operate reliably in a sand storm. Particle Technology has many years experience in supplying test dusts manufactured to International Standards along with test dusts manufactured to customer specific standards.

All test dusts and contaminants are rigorously controlled to ensure that test results are 100% reliable.

Environmental Dust Testing
Particle Technology houses the UK's largest dust testing facility, with the largest chamber capable of testing an entire vehicle.  Particle Technology had invested in the custom built chambers to ensure that all test conditions in modern standards can be met and guaranteed.

Cleanliness Testing
Cleanliness testing is performed by many companies in the automotive and aerospace industries to ensure that components are cleaned to the required standards for long life reliability. Particle Technology offer a contract laboratory service that allows companies to have fast and accurate results.

For companies where the volume of testing is high, Particle Technology offer a cleanliness testing package.

Name: Marcom Services, LLC
Description: Marcom Services is a full service preservation company specializing in the removal and re-application of shipboard coating systems. Marcom’s surface preparation capabilities and services include abrasive blasting, ultra-high pressure (UHP) hydro blasting, power tool cleaning, and heavy metal abatement. Marcom’s coating application capabilities and services include epoxies, urethanes, polysiloxanes, alkyds, zinc coatings, rapid cure single coat systems, and non-skid deck coatings. Additionally, Marcom is heavily involved with the Navy’s Research and Development into corrosion control as the chosen contractor for the US Naval Research Laboratories new technology coatings and surface prep methods. Marcom is also experienced in providing the Navy and other prime contractors with consulting services, including corrosion assessments, maintenance strategies and planning, specification writing or review, quality assurance support, and project management.  Marcom is able to provide all of these services on a fixed price or a leased labor contract structure.
